11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
25	test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
26	ZRBGC_SOURCED=1
27	
28	# Tinder constants (pure string literals, no variable expansion — available at source time)
29	# Depot project ID infix between RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX and RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER, consumed
30	# by rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh's RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID derivation.
31	RBGC_depot_project_infix="d-"
32	
33	######################################################################
34	# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)
35	
36	zrbgc_kindle() {
37	  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
38	
39	  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
40	  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
41	  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
42	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
43	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
44	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
45	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
46	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
47	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
48	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
49	
50	  # Global resource validation patterns
51	  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS  (timestamp survives — payor is installation-scoped, not depot-scoped)
52	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
53	
54	  # Basic Configuration
55	  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
56	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
57	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
58	
59	  # Timeouts
60	  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
61	  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
62	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
63	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10
64	
65	  # JWT-bearer consumer-side retry — every RBRA consumer absorbs the post-write
66	  # race where Google's OAuth backend has not yet accepted a freshly-minted SA
67	  # or its key, surfaced as `invalid_grant` paired with either
68	  # `Invalid JWT Signature.` (fresh-key lag) or `Invalid grant: account not
69	  # found` (fresh-SA lag). 90s budget locked by ₣BB pristine-tier contract;
70	  # cadence below.
71	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_BUDGET_SEC=90
72	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC=2
73	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_SEC=15
74	
75	  # IAM-grant propagation retry — exponential-backoff budget shared by every
76	  # get-modify-set IAM grant site in rbgi_IAM.sh plus the inline GAR retry in
77	  # rbgg_invest_director. Recognizes three propagation classes against the
78	  # same time budget: (A) forward member-visibility (HTTP 400 "does not
79	  # exist"), (B) backward member-visibility (HTTP 400 "is not deleted"),
80	  # (C) caller-recently-empowered (HTTP 403 from resource-scope IAM caches).
81	  # Class C is time-bounded only — real propagation succeeds within budget,
82	  # real denial waits the budget and fails cleanly. RBSCIP locks the profile.
83	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC=3
84	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC=20
85	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC=420
86	
87	  # HTTP transient-failure retry — bounded retry on curl-network blips
88	  # (connection refused 7, timeout 28, TLS handshake 35, recv failure 56).
89	  # Shared by rbgu_http_json and the OAuth token-mint POST. Other curl exits
90	  # are configuration-deterministic and fail fast.
91	  readonly RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_ATTEMPTS=3
92	  readonly RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_SLEEP_SEC=3
93	
94	  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
95	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
96	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_AUTHORIZE_URL="https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth"
97	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_USERINFO_URL="https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo"
98	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
99	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
100	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
101	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
102	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
103	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
104	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
105	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
106	  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
107	  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
108	
109	  # OAuth Scopes
110	  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"
111	
112	  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
113	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
114	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
115	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
116	
117	  # Email/Domain Assembly
118	  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
119	
120	  # API Version Paths
121	  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
122	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
123	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
124	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
125	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
126	  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
127	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
128	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
129	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
130	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
131	  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"
132	
133	  # REST Path Fragments
134	  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
135	  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
136	  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
137	  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
138	  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"
139	
140	  # REST Operation Suffixes
141	  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
142	  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
143	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
144	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"
145	
146	  # Operation Prefixes
147	  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"
148	
149	  # Ark Artifact Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
150	  # Each ark type is a plain basename sibling under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/.
151	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE="image"
152	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT="about"
153	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH="vouch"
154	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS="diags"
155	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST="attest"
156	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH="pouch"
157	
158	  # Hallmark Prefix Letters
159	  # Encode artifact provenance in the leading character of a hallmark stamp.
160	  # Kludge hallmarks are local-only; the other three originate in GAR.
161	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_CONJURE="c"
162	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_KLUDGE="k"
163	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_BIND="b"
164	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_GRAFT="g"
165	
166	  # GAR Categorical Namespaces (₢A_AAK layout)
167	  # Top-level namespaces under which arks are stored. Consumed by rbgl_GarLayout.sh.
168	  # The hm/rq/es siblings hold Director-authored image families; rbi_df holds
169	  # Payor-authored depot-scoped OCI artifacts produced during depot lifetime.
170	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS="rbi_hm"
171	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES="rbi_rq"
172	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES="rbi_es"
173	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_DEPOT_FACTS="rbi_df"
174	
175	  # rbi_df layout: flat sea of files. No subdirs. Each filename names one
176	  # depot-scoped artifact whose content is its assignment.
177	  #
178	  # Today (BO levy-establish-probes):
179	  #   probe-tether:probe   — tether pool levy-time capability probe
180	  #   probe-airgap:probe   — airgap pool levy-time capability probe
181	  #
182	  # Future: each new filename is intended to be an RBRD variable name (planned
183	  # uBuN heat — peel depot-time-immutable settings out of RBRR). The file's
184	  # content is that variable's assignment.
185	  #
186	  # Explicitly NOT in rbi_df: the uBuN depot-manifest tripwire lives in GCS,
187	  # not GAR — different mechanism, different shape.
188	  #
189	  # Enumerators (rbw-iah / rbw-iar / rbw-iae) ignore rbi_df by design — its
190	  # contents are operational, not part of the hallmark/reliquary/enshrine
191	  # image catalogue.
192	
193	  # Reliquary Tool Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
194	  # Canonical tool names under rbi_rq/<date>/. Authoritative
195	  # manifest lives in rbgji/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh.
196	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD="gcloud"
197	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER="docker"
198	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE="alpine"
199	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT="syft"
200	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT="binfmt"
201	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO="skopeo"
202	
203	  # Fact-file filenames (written to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR by producers, read by tests)
204	  readonly RBF_FACT_HALLMARK="rbf_fact_hallmark"
205	  readonly RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID="rbf_fact_build_id"
206	  readonly RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT="rbf_fact_gar_root"
207	  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM="rbf_fact_ark_stem"
208	  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD="rbf_fact_ark_yield"
209	  readonly RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY="rbf_fact_reliquary"
210	
211	  # Payor fact-file filenames (governor identifying values)
212	  readonly RBGP_FACT_GOVERNOR_SA_EMAIL="rbgp_fact_governor_sa_email"
213	
214	  # Depot lifecycle-state vocabulary. Fact-file extensions live in RBCC.
215	  # rbgp_depot_list emits one fact file per known depot at
216	  # "<cloud_prefix>/<moniker>.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}" with content equal to
217	  # one of the values below. The cloud_prefix subdir prevents collisions
218	  # between same-moniker depots under different cloud_prefixes.
219	  readonly RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE="COMPLETE"
220	  readonly RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED="DELETE_REQUESTED"
221	
222	  # DisplayName anchor used across depot-creation sites (depot project,
223	  # Mason SA, Governor SA). Search backend filters CRM v3 projects:search
224	  # by displayName starting with this anchor. Distinct, unmistakable string
225	  # ensures no collision with non-depot projects in the operator's account.
226	  readonly RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX="RBGC-DEPOT"
227	
228	  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
229	  readonly RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"
230	
231	  # GAR Cleanup Policy (applied at depot levy — see RBSDE "Create Container Repository").
232	  # Reaps untagged manifests on GAR's daily cleanup cadence; underwrites the V2-DELETE-by-tag
233	  # contract documented in RBSIJ for multi-platform orphan children.
234	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CLEANUP_POLICY_ID="rb-delete-untagged"
235	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CLEANUP_OLDER_THAN_SEC="86400s"
236	
237	
238	  # Canonical Role IDs
239	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
240	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
241	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
242	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER="roles/containeranalysis.occurrences.viewer"
243	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"
244	
245	  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
246	  readonly RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"
247	
248	  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
249	  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
250	  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
251	
252	  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
253	  readonly RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"
254	
255	  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"
256	
257	
258	  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)
259	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER="-tether"
260	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"
261	  readonly RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX="-pool"
262	  readonly RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS="/workerPools"
263	
264	  readonly ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
265	}
266	
267	zrbgc_sentinel() {
268	  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
269	}
270	
271	# eof
272	
273

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGC_SOURCED=1

# Tinder constants (pure string literals, no variable expansion — available at source time)
# Depot project ID infix between RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX and RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER, consumed
# by rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh's RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID derivation.
RBGC_depot_project_infix="d-"

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)

zrbgc_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"

  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"

  # Global resource validation patterns
  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS  (timestamp survives — payor is installation-scoped, not depot-scoped)
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"

  # Basic Configuration
  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"

  # Timeouts
  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10

  # JWT-bearer consumer-side retry — every RBRA consumer absorbs the post-write
  # race where Google's OAuth backend has not yet accepted a freshly-minted SA
  # or its key, surfaced as `invalid_grant` paired with either
  # `Invalid JWT Signature.` (fresh-key lag) or `Invalid grant: account not
  # found` (fresh-SA lag). 90s budget locked by ₣BB pristine-tier contract;
  # cadence below.
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_BUDGET_SEC=90
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC=2
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_SEC=15

  # IAM-grant propagation retry — exponential-backoff budget shared by every
  # get-modify-set IAM grant site in rbgi_IAM.sh plus the inline GAR retry in
  # rbgg_invest_director. Recognizes three propagation classes against the
  # same time budget: (A) forward member-visibility (HTTP 400 "does not
  # exist"), (B) backward member-visibility (HTTP 400 "is not deleted"),
  # (C) caller-recently-empowered (HTTP 403 from resource-scope IAM caches).
  # Class C is time-bounded only — real propagation succeeds within budget,
  # real denial waits the budget and fails cleanly. RBSCIP locks the profile.
  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC=3
  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC=20
  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC=420

  # HTTP transient-failure retry — bounded retry on curl-network blips
  # (connection refused 7, timeout 28, TLS handshake 35, recv failure 56).
  # Shared by rbgu_http_json and the OAuth token-mint POST. Other curl exits
  # are configuration-deterministic and fail fast.
  readonly RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_ATTEMPTS=3
  readonly RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_SLEEP_SEC=3

  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_AUTHORIZE_URL="https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth"
  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_USERINFO_URL="https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"

  # OAuth Scopes
  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"

  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"

  # Email/Domain Assembly
  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"

  # API Version Paths
  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"

  # REST Path Fragments
  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"

  # REST Operation Suffixes
  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"

  # Operation Prefixes
  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"

  # Ark Artifact Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Each ark type is a plain basename sibling under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/.
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE="image"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT="about"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH="vouch"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS="diags"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST="attest"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH="pouch"

  # Hallmark Prefix Letters
  # Encode artifact provenance in the leading character of a hallmark stamp.
  # Kludge hallmarks are local-only; the other three originate in GAR.
  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_CONJURE="c"
  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_KLUDGE="k"
  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_BIND="b"
  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_GRAFT="g"

  # GAR Categorical Namespaces (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Top-level namespaces under which arks are stored. Consumed by rbgl_GarLayout.sh.
  # The hm/rq/es siblings hold Director-authored image families; rbi_df holds
  # Payor-authored depot-scoped OCI artifacts produced during depot lifetime.
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS="rbi_hm"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES="rbi_rq"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES="rbi_es"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_DEPOT_FACTS="rbi_df"

  # rbi_df layout: flat sea of files. No subdirs. Each filename names one
  # depot-scoped artifact whose content is its assignment.
  #
  # Today (BO levy-establish-probes):
  #   probe-tether:probe   — tether pool levy-time capability probe
  #   probe-airgap:probe   — airgap pool levy-time capability probe
  #
  # Future: each new filename is intended to be an RBRD variable name (planned
  # uBuN heat — peel depot-time-immutable settings out of RBRR). The file's
  # content is that variable's assignment.
  #
  # Explicitly NOT in rbi_df: the uBuN depot-manifest tripwire lives in GCS,
  # not GAR — different mechanism, different shape.
  #
  # Enumerators (rbw-iah / rbw-iar / rbw-iae) ignore rbi_df by design — its
  # contents are operational, not part of the hallmark/reliquary/enshrine
  # image catalogue.

  # Reliquary Tool Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Canonical tool names under rbi_rq/<date>/. Authoritative
  # manifest lives in rbgji/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh.
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD="gcloud"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER="docker"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE="alpine"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT="syft"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT="binfmt"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO="skopeo"

  # Fact-file filenames (written to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR by producers, read by tests)
  readonly RBF_FACT_HALLMARK="rbf_fact_hallmark"
  readonly RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID="rbf_fact_build_id"
  readonly RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT="rbf_fact_gar_root"
  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM="rbf_fact_ark_stem"
  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD="rbf_fact_ark_yield"
  readonly RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY="rbf_fact_reliquary"

  # Payor fact-file filenames (governor identifying values)
  readonly RBGP_FACT_GOVERNOR_SA_EMAIL="rbgp_fact_governor_sa_email"

  # Depot lifecycle-state vocabulary. Fact-file extensions live in RBCC.
  # rbgp_depot_list emits one fact file per known depot at
  # "<cloud_prefix>/<moniker>.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}" with content equal to
  # one of the values below. The cloud_prefix subdir prevents collisions
  # between same-moniker depots under different cloud_prefixes.
  readonly RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE="COMPLETE"
  readonly RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED="DELETE_REQUESTED"

  # DisplayName anchor used across depot-creation sites (depot project,
  # Mason SA, Governor SA). Search backend filters CRM v3 projects:search
  # by displayName starting with this anchor. Distinct, unmistakable string
  # ensures no collision with non-depot projects in the operator's account.
  readonly RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX="RBGC-DEPOT"

  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
  readonly RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"

  # GAR Cleanup Policy (applied at depot levy — see RBSDE "Create Container Repository").
  # Reaps untagged manifests on GAR's daily cleanup cadence; underwrites the V2-DELETE-by-tag
  # contract documented in RBSIJ for multi-platform orphan children.
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CLEANUP_POLICY_ID="rb-delete-untagged"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CLEANUP_OLDER_THAN_SEC="86400s"


  # Canonical Role IDs
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER="roles/containeranalysis.occurrences.viewer"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"

  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
  readonly RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"

  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"

  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
  readonly RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"

  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"


  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)
  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER="-tether"
  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"
  readonly RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX="-pool"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS="/workerPools"

  readonly ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgc_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
}

# eof

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2024 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Regime Nameplate - Validator Module
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBRN_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBRN_SOURCED=1
26	
27	######################################################################
28	# Internal Functions (zrbrn_*)
29	
30	zrbrn_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn already kindled"
32	
33	  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
34	  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.
35	
36	  # Enroll all RBRN variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering
37	
38	  buv_regime_enroll RBRN
39	
40	  buv_group_enroll "Core Service Identity"
41	  buv_xname_enroll   RBRN_MONIKER                 2   12  "Unique identifier for Crucible"
42	  buv_string_enroll  RBRN_DESCRIPTION              0  120  "Human-readable description"
43	  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_RUNTIME                              "Container runtime: docker or podman" \
44	                     docker podman
45	
46	  buv_group_enroll "Container Image Configuration"
47	  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL            1  128  "Vessel identifier for Sentry Image"
48	  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL            1  128  "Vessel identifier for Bottle Image"
49	  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK      1  128  "Hallmark tag for Sentry Image"
50	  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK      1  128  "Hallmark tag for Bottle Image"
51	
52	  buv_group_enroll "Service Readiness"
53	  buv_decimal_enroll RBRN_BOTTLE_READINESS_DELAY_SEC  0  300  "Seconds to wait after compose-up for bottle services to become ready (0 = no wait)"
54	
55	  buv_group_enroll "Entry Service Configuration"
56	  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE                           "Entry functionality: disabled or enabled" \
57	                     disabled enabled
58	  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE  enabled
59	  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION               "External port on Transit Network"
60	  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE                   "Enclave port between Sentry and Bottle"
61	
62	  buv_group_enroll "Enclave Network Configuration"
63	  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP                      "Base IPv4 for enclave network"
64	  buv_decimal_enroll RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK          8   30  "Network mask width (8-30)"
65	  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP                    "IP address for Sentry Container"
66	  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP                    "IP address for Bottle Container"
67	
68	  buv_group_enroll "Uplink Core"
69	  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN                      "Minimum port for outbound connections"
70	  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE                      "DNS mode: disabled, global, or allowlist" \
71	                     disabled global allowlist
72	  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE                   "IP access mode: disabled, global, or allowlist" \
73	                     disabled global allowlist
74	
75	  buv_group_enroll "Uplink DNS Allowlist"
76	  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE  allowlist
77	  buv_list_domain_enroll RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS           "Allowed DNS domains"
78	
79	  buv_group_enroll "Uplink Access Allowlist"
80	  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE  allowlist
81	  buv_list_cidr_enroll   RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS             "Allowed CIDR ranges"
82	
83	  # Guard against unexpected RBRN_ variables not in enrollment
84	  buv_scope_sentinel RBRN RBRN_
85	
86	  # Lock all enrolled RBRN_ variables against mutation
87	  buv_lock RBRN
88	
89	  readonly ZRBRN_KINDLED=1
90	}
91	
92	zrbrn_sentinel() {
93	  test "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrn not kindled - call zrbrn_kindle first"
94	}
95	
96	# Enforce all RBRN enrollment validations and custom format checks
97	zrbrn_enforce() {
98	  zrbrn_sentinel
99	
100	  buv_vet RBRN
101	
102	  # Verify IPs fall within declared subnet
103	  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
104	  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
105	
106	  # Cross-port check (entry ports must be less than uplink port min)
107	  if test "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" = "enabled"; then
108	    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
109	      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
110	    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
111	      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
112	  fi
113	
114	  # Build docker env args array from validated values
115	  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
116	  buv_docker_env RBRN ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV
117	}
118	
119	######################################################################
120	# Public Functions (rbrn_*)
121	
122	# List available nameplate monikers as space-separated tokens
123	# Prerequisite: RBCC sourced (needs RBBC_dot_dir, RBCC_rbrn_file)
124	rbrn_list_capture() {
125	  zrbcc_sentinel
126	
127	  local z_result=""
128	  local z_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/"*"/${RBCC_rbrn_file}")
129	  local z_i=""
130	  for z_i in "${!z_files[@]}"; do
131	    test -f "${z_files[$z_i]}" || continue
132	    local z_dir="${z_files[$z_i]%/*}"
133	    local z_moniker="${z_dir##*/}"
134	    z_result="${z_result}${z_result:+ }${z_moniker}"
135	  done
136	  test -n "${z_result}" || return 1
137	  echo "${z_result}"
138	}
139	
140	######################################################################
141	# Cross-Nameplate Functions
142	#
143	# rbrn_preflight:  Requires RBCC kindled (called from CLI rbrn_audit)
144	
145	# Convert dotted-quad IPv4 to integer for subnet arithmetic
146	zrbrn_ip_to_int() {
147	  local z_a z_b z_c z_d
148	  IFS='.' read -r z_a z_b z_c z_d <<< "$1"
149	  echo $(( (z_a << 24) + (z_b << 16) + (z_c << 8) + z_d ))
150	}
151	
152	# Validate that an IP falls within a subnet (dies if not)
153	# Usage: zrbrn_ip_in_subnet LABEL IP BASE MASK
154	zrbrn_ip_in_subnet() {
155	  local z_label="$1" z_ip="$2" z_base="$3" z_mask="$4"
156	  local z_ip_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_ip}")
157	  local z_base_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
158	  local z_net_mask=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
159	  if [[ $(( z_ip_int & z_net_mask )) -ne $(( z_base_int & z_net_mask )) ]]; then
160	    buc_die "${z_label}=${z_ip} is not within subnet ${z_base}/${z_mask}"
161	  fi
162	}
163	
164	# Cross-nameplate conflict validation (silent on success, dies on conflict)
165	# Checks: port uniqueness, subnet non-overlap, enclave IP uniqueness
166	rbrn_preflight() {
167	  zrbcc_sentinel
168	
169	  # Collect structured data from all nameplates via isolation subshells
170	  local z_nameplate_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/"*"/${RBCC_rbrn_file}")
171	  local z_data_lines=()
172	  local z_nf_i=""
173	  for z_nf_i in "${!z_nameplate_files[@]}"; do
174	    test -f "${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}" || continue
175	    local z_line
176	    z_line=$(
177	      bash -c '
178	        source "$1" || exit 1
179	        echo "${RBRN_MONIKER}|${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-0}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-0}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}"
180	      ' _ "${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}"
181	    ) || buc_die "Preflight isolation failed for: ${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}"
182	    z_data_lines+=("${z_line}")
183	  done
184	
185	  # Parallel arrays for conflict detection (bash 3.2 compatible)
186	  local z_ws_port_keys=()
187	  local z_ws_port_vals=()
188	  local z_enc_port_keys=()
189	  local z_enc_port_vals=()
190	  local z_ip_keys=()
191	  local z_ip_vals=()
192	  local z_net_starts=()
193	  local z_net_ends=()
194	  local z_net_owners=()
195	
196	  local z_mon=""
197	  local z_entry=""
198	  local z_ws=""
199	  local z_enc=""
200	  local z_base=""
201	  local z_mask=""
202	  local z_sentry=""
203	  local z_bottle=""
204	  for z_nf_i in "${!z_data_lines[@]}"; do
205	    IFS='|' read -r z_mon z_entry z_ws z_enc z_base z_mask z_sentry z_bottle <<< "${z_data_lines[$z_nf_i]}" \
206	      || buc_die "Failed to parse nameplate data line"
207	    test -n "${z_mon}" || continue
208	
209	    # Workstation and enclave port uniqueness (enabled entries only)
210	    if test "${z_entry}" = "enabled"; then
211	      local z_i
212	      for z_i in "${!z_ws_port_keys[@]}"; do
213	        if test "${z_ws_port_keys[$z_i]}" = "${z_ws}"; then
214	          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION=${z_ws} claimed by both ${z_ws_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
215	        fi
216	      done
217	      z_ws_port_keys+=("${z_ws}")
218	      z_ws_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")
219	
220	      # Enclave ports are scoped to their Docker network — key on base_ip:port
221	      local z_enc_key="${z_base}:${z_enc}"
222	      for z_i in "${!z_enc_port_keys[@]}"; do
223	        if test "${z_enc_port_keys[$z_i]}" = "${z_enc_key}"; then
224	          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE=${z_enc} on network ${z_base} claimed by both ${z_enc_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
225	        fi
226	      done
227	      z_enc_port_keys+=("${z_enc_key}")
228	      z_enc_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")
229	    fi
230	
231	    # Enclave IP uniqueness (all sentry and bottle IPs across nameplates)
232	    local z_j
233	    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
234	      if test "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" = "${z_sentry}"; then
235	        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_sentry} claimed by ${z_mon} (sentry) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
236	      fi
237	    done
238	    z_ip_keys+=("${z_sentry}")
239	    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:sentry")
240	
241	    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
242	      if test "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" = "${z_bottle}"; then
243	        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_bottle} claimed by ${z_mon} (bottle) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
244	      fi
245	    done
246	    z_ip_keys+=("${z_bottle}")
247	    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:bottle")
248	
249	    # Subnet non-overlap
250	    local z_net_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
251	    local z_net_mask_bits=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
252	    local z_net_addr=$(( z_net_int & z_net_mask_bits ))
253	    local z_net_size=$(( 1 << (32 - z_mask) ))
254	    local z_net_end=$(( z_net_addr + z_net_size - 1 ))
255	
256	    local z_k
257	    for z_k in "${!z_net_starts[@]}"; do
258	      if [[ ${z_net_addr} -le ${z_net_ends[$z_k]} ]] && [[ ${z_net_starts[$z_k]} -le ${z_net_end} ]]; then
259	        buc_die "Subnet overlap: ${z_base}/${z_mask} (${z_mon}) overlaps with network of ${z_net_owners[$z_k]}"
260	      fi
261	    done
262	    z_net_starts+=("${z_net_addr}")
263	    z_net_ends+=("${z_net_end}")
264	    z_net_owners+=("${z_mon}")
265	
266	  done
267	}
268	
269	# eof
270

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2024 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Regime Nameplate - Validator Module

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBRN_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBRN_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbrn_*)

zrbrn_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn already kindled"

  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.

  # Enroll all RBRN variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering

  buv_regime_enroll RBRN

  buv_group_enroll "Core Service Identity"
  buv_xname_enroll   RBRN_MONIKER                 2   12  "Unique identifier for Crucible"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRN_DESCRIPTION              0  120  "Human-readable description"
  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_RUNTIME                              "Container runtime: docker or podman" \
                     docker podman

  buv_group_enroll "Container Image Configuration"
  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL            1  128  "Vessel identifier for Sentry Image"
  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL            1  128  "Vessel identifier for Bottle Image"
  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK      1  128  "Hallmark tag for Sentry Image"
  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK      1  128  "Hallmark tag for Bottle Image"

  buv_group_enroll "Service Readiness"
  buv_decimal_enroll RBRN_BOTTLE_READINESS_DELAY_SEC  0  300  "Seconds to wait after compose-up for bottle services to become ready (0 = no wait)"

  buv_group_enroll "Entry Service Configuration"
  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE                           "Entry functionality: disabled or enabled" \
                     disabled enabled
  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE  enabled
  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION               "External port on Transit Network"
  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE                   "Enclave port between Sentry and Bottle"

  buv_group_enroll "Enclave Network Configuration"
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP                      "Base IPv4 for enclave network"
  buv_decimal_enroll RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK          8   30  "Network mask width (8-30)"
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP                    "IP address for Sentry Container"
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP                    "IP address for Bottle Container"

  buv_group_enroll "Uplink Core"
  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN                      "Minimum port for outbound connections"
  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE                      "DNS mode: disabled, global, or allowlist" \
                     disabled global allowlist
  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE                   "IP access mode: disabled, global, or allowlist" \
                     disabled global allowlist

  buv_group_enroll "Uplink DNS Allowlist"
  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE  allowlist
  buv_list_domain_enroll RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS           "Allowed DNS domains"

  buv_group_enroll "Uplink Access Allowlist"
  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE  allowlist
  buv_list_cidr_enroll   RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS             "Allowed CIDR ranges"

  # Guard against unexpected RBRN_ variables not in enrollment
  buv_scope_sentinel RBRN RBRN_

  # Lock all enrolled RBRN_ variables against mutation
  buv_lock RBRN

  readonly ZRBRN_KINDLED=1
}

zrbrn_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrn not kindled - call zrbrn_kindle first"
}

# Enforce all RBRN enrollment validations and custom format checks
zrbrn_enforce() {
  zrbrn_sentinel

  buv_vet RBRN

  # Verify IPs fall within declared subnet
  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"

  # Cross-port check (entry ports must be less than uplink port min)
  if test "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" = "enabled"; then
    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
  fi

  # Build docker env args array from validated values
  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
  buv_docker_env RBRN ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV
}

######################################################################
# Public Functions (rbrn_*)

# List available nameplate monikers as space-separated tokens
# Prerequisite: RBCC sourced (needs RBBC_dot_dir, RBCC_rbrn_file)
rbrn_list_capture() {
  zrbcc_sentinel

  local z_result=""
  local z_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/"*"/${RBCC_rbrn_file}")
  local z_i=""
  for z_i in "${!z_files[@]}"; do
    test -f "${z_files[$z_i]}" || continue
    local z_dir="${z_files[$z_i]%/*}"
    local z_moniker="${z_dir##*/}"
    z_result="${z_result}${z_result:+ }${z_moniker}"
  done
  test -n "${z_result}" || return 1
  echo "${z_result}"
}

######################################################################
# Cross-Nameplate Functions
#
# rbrn_preflight:  Requires RBCC kindled (called from CLI rbrn_audit)

# Convert dotted-quad IPv4 to integer for subnet arithmetic
zrbrn_ip_to_int() {
  local z_a z_b z_c z_d
  IFS='.' read -r z_a z_b z_c z_d <<< "$1"
  echo $(( (z_a << 24) + (z_b << 16) + (z_c << 8) + z_d ))
}

# Validate that an IP falls within a subnet (dies if not)
# Usage: zrbrn_ip_in_subnet LABEL IP BASE MASK
zrbrn_ip_in_subnet() {
  local z_label="$1" z_ip="$2" z_base="$3" z_mask="$4"
  local z_ip_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_ip}")
  local z_base_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
  local z_net_mask=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
  if [[ $(( z_ip_int & z_net_mask )) -ne $(( z_base_int & z_net_mask )) ]]; then
    buc_die "${z_label}=${z_ip} is not within subnet ${z_base}/${z_mask}"
  fi
}

# Cross-nameplate conflict validation (silent on success, dies on conflict)
# Checks: port uniqueness, subnet non-overlap, enclave IP uniqueness
rbrn_preflight() {
  zrbcc_sentinel

  # Collect structured data from all nameplates via isolation subshells
  local z_nameplate_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/"*"/${RBCC_rbrn_file}")
  local z_data_lines=()
  local z_nf_i=""
  for z_nf_i in "${!z_nameplate_files[@]}"; do
    test -f "${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}" || continue
    local z_line
    z_line=$(
      bash -c '
        source "$1" || exit 1
        echo "${RBRN_MONIKER}|${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-0}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-0}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}"
      ' _ "${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}"
    ) || buc_die "Preflight isolation failed for: ${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}"
    z_data_lines+=("${z_line}")
  done

  # Parallel arrays for conflict detection (bash 3.2 compatible)
  local z_ws_port_keys=()
  local z_ws_port_vals=()
  local z_enc_port_keys=()
  local z_enc_port_vals=()
  local z_ip_keys=()
  local z_ip_vals=()
  local z_net_starts=()
  local z_net_ends=()
  local z_net_owners=()

  local z_mon=""
  local z_entry=""
  local z_ws=""
  local z_enc=""
  local z_base=""
  local z_mask=""
  local z_sentry=""
  local z_bottle=""
  for z_nf_i in "${!z_data_lines[@]}"; do
    IFS='|' read -r z_mon z_entry z_ws z_enc z_base z_mask z_sentry z_bottle <<< "${z_data_lines[$z_nf_i]}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to parse nameplate data line"
    test -n "${z_mon}" || continue

    # Workstation and enclave port uniqueness (enabled entries only)
    if test "${z_entry}" = "enabled"; then
      local z_i
      for z_i in "${!z_ws_port_keys[@]}"; do
        if test "${z_ws_port_keys[$z_i]}" = "${z_ws}"; then
          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION=${z_ws} claimed by both ${z_ws_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
        fi
      done
      z_ws_port_keys+=("${z_ws}")
      z_ws_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")

      # Enclave ports are scoped to their Docker network — key on base_ip:port
      local z_enc_key="${z_base}:${z_enc}"
      for z_i in "${!z_enc_port_keys[@]}"; do
        if test "${z_enc_port_keys[$z_i]}" = "${z_enc_key}"; then
          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE=${z_enc} on network ${z_base} claimed by both ${z_enc_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
        fi
      done
      z_enc_port_keys+=("${z_enc_key}")
      z_enc_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")
    fi

    # Enclave IP uniqueness (all sentry and bottle IPs across nameplates)
    local z_j
    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
      if test "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" = "${z_sentry}"; then
        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_sentry} claimed by ${z_mon} (sentry) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
      fi
    done
    z_ip_keys+=("${z_sentry}")
    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:sentry")

    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
      if test "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" = "${z_bottle}"; then
        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_bottle} claimed by ${z_mon} (bottle) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
      fi
    done
    z_ip_keys+=("${z_bottle}")
    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:bottle")

    # Subnet non-overlap
    local z_net_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
    local z_net_mask_bits=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
    local z_net_addr=$(( z_net_int & z_net_mask_bits ))
    local z_net_size=$(( 1 << (32 - z_mask) ))
    local z_net_end=$(( z_net_addr + z_net_size - 1 ))

    local z_k
    for z_k in "${!z_net_starts[@]}"; do
      if [[ ${z_net_addr} -le ${z_net_ends[$z_k]} ]] && [[ ${z_net_starts[$z_k]} -le ${z_net_end} ]]; then
        buc_die "Subnet overlap: ${z_base}/${z_mask} (${z_mon}) overlaps with network of ${z_net_owners[$z_k]}"
      fi
    done
    z_net_starts+=("${z_net_addr}")
    z_net_ends+=("${z_net_end}")
    z_net_owners+=("${z_mon}")

  done
}

# eof

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# RBRN CLI - Command line interface for RBRN nameplate regime operations
20	#
21	# Differential furnish: light deps (validate, render) always loaded;
22	# heavy deps (survey, audit) loaded only when needed.
23	
24	set -euo pipefail
25	
26	# Source dependencies
27	source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
28	
29	######################################################################
30	# Internal Helpers
31	
32	# Fleet info table — non-opinionated display of all nameplate configuration
33	# Requires: RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded (via differential furnish)
34	zrbrn_fleet_survey() {
35	  zrbcc_sentinel
36	  zrbgc_sentinel
37	  zrbgd_sentinel
38	  zrbrr_sentinel
39	
40	  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
41	  local -r z_row_fmt="%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n"
42	  echo ""
43	  printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
44	    "Moniker" "Entry" "WS" "Enc" "Subnet" "Sentry IP" "Bottle IP" "Snt" "Btl"
45	  printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
46	    "--------" "-----" "------" "------" "-----------------" "--------------" "--------------" "---" "---"
47	
48	  local z_sv_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/"*"/${RBCC_rbrn_file}")
49	  local z_sv_i=""
50	  for z_sv_i in "${!z_sv_files[@]}"; do
51	    test -f "${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}" || continue
52	    (
53	      source "${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}" || buc_die "Failed to source: ${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}"
54	
55	      local z_sentry_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}"
56	      local z_bottle_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}"
57	
58	      local z_sentry_local="--"
59	      local z_bottle_local="--"
60	      if command -v "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
61	        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_sentry_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_sentry_local="ok"
62	        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_bottle_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_bottle_local="ok"
63	      else
64	        z_sentry_local="??"
65	        z_bottle_local="??"
66	      fi
67	
68	      local z_ws_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
69	      local z_enc_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"
70	      if [[ "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" != "enabled" ]]; then
71	        z_ws_port="-"
72	        z_enc_port="-"
73	      fi
74	
75	      printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
76	        "${RBRN_MONIKER}" "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" "${z_ws_port}" "${z_enc_port}" \
77	        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}" \
78	        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" \
79	        "${z_sentry_local}" "${z_bottle_local}" || buc_die "Failed to printf survey row"
80	    ) || buc_die "Survey isolation failed for: ${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}"
81	  done
82	  echo ""
83	}
84	
85	######################################################################
86	# Command Functions
87	
88	# Command: validate - enrollment-based validation report
89	rbrn_validate() {
90	  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRN nameplate regime configuration via enrollment report"
91	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
92	
93	  if test -z "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
94	    rbrn_list
95	    buc_die "Nameplate moniker required"
96	  fi
97	  buc_step "Validating RBRN nameplate regime"
98	  buv_report RBRN "Nameplate Regime"
99	  buc_step "RBRN nameplate valid"
100	}
101	
102	# Command: render - diagnostic display
103	rbrn_render() {
104	  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRN nameplate regime configuration"
105	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
106	
107	  if test -z "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
108	    rbrn_list
109	    buc_die "Nameplate moniker required"
110	  fi
111	  local z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${BUZ_FOLIO}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
112	  buv_render RBRN "RBRN - Recipe Bottle Regime Nameplate" "${z_nameplate_file}"
113	}
114	
115	# Command: survey - fleet info table across all nameplates
116	rbrn_survey() {
117	  buc_doc_brief "Display fleet info table for all nameplate configurations"
118	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
119	
120	  zrbrn_fleet_survey
121	}
122	
123	# Command: audit - survey display then preflight validation
124	rbrn_audit() {
125	  buc_doc_brief "Survey all nameplates and run cross-nameplate preflight validation"
126	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
127	
128	  zrbrn_fleet_survey
129	  rbrn_preflight
130	  buc_step "Cross-nameplate audit passed"
131	
132	  buc_step "Full audit passed (nameplates)"
133	}
134	
135	# Command: list - show available nameplate monikers
136	rbrn_list() {
137	  buc_doc_brief "List available nameplate monikers"
138	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
139	
140	  local z_monikers
141	  z_monikers=$(rbrn_list_capture) || buc_die "No nameplates found"
142	  buc_step "Available nameplates:"
143	  local z_moniker=""
144	  for z_moniker in ${z_monikers}; do
145	    buc_bare "        ${z_moniker}"
146	  done
147	}
148	
149	######################################################################
150	# Furnish and Main
151	
152	zrbrn_furnish() {
153	  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
154	  buc_doc_env "BURD_TOOLS_DIR        " "Project tools root directory (dispatch-provided)"
155	  buc_doc_env_done || return 0
156	
157	  local z_command="${1:-}"
158	
159	  # Light sources (always)
160	  source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh"
161	  local z_rbk_kit_dir="${BURD_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"
162	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buv_validation.sh"
163	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
164	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/bupr_PresentationRegime.sh"
165	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
166	  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrn_regime.sh"
167	
168	  # Heavy sources (survey/audit only)
169	  case "${z_command}" in
170	    rbrn_survey|rbrn_audit)
171	      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrr_regime.sh"
172	      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh"
173	      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
174	      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgl_GarLayout.sh"
175	      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
176	      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgo_OAuth.sh"
177	      ;;
178	  esac
179	
180	  # Light kindles (always)
181	  zbuv_kindle
182	  zburd_kindle
183	  zburd_enforce
184	  zbupr_kindle
185	  zrbcc_kindle
186	  test "${z_rbk_kit_dir}" = "${RBCC_KIT_DIR}" || buc_die "z_rbk_kit_dir mismatch: ${z_rbk_kit_dir} != ${RBCC_KIT_DIR}"
187	
188	  # Heavy kindles (survey/audit only)
189	  case "${z_command}" in
190	    rbrn_survey|rbrn_audit)
191	      source "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
192	      zrbgc_kindle
193	      zrbgl_kindle
194	      zrbrr_kindle
195	      zrbrr_enforce
196	      zrbdc_kindle
197	      zrbgo_kindle
198	      zrbgd_kindle
199	      ;;
200	  esac
201	
202	  # If BUZ_FOLIO is set, load and kindle the specified nameplate
203	  if test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
204	    local z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${BUZ_FOLIO}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
205	    test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Nameplate not found: ${z_nameplate_file}"
206	    source "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source nameplate: ${z_nameplate_file}"
207	    zrbrn_kindle
208	    zrbrn_enforce
209	  fi
210	}
211	
212	buc_execute rbrn_ "Recipe Bottle Nameplate Regime" zrbrn_furnish "$@"
213	
214	# eof
215

# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# RBRN CLI - Command line interface for RBRN nameplate regime operations
#
# Differential furnish: light deps (validate, render) always loaded;
# heavy deps (survey, audit) loaded only when needed.

set -euo pipefail

# Source dependencies
source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"

######################################################################
# Internal Helpers

# Fleet info table — non-opinionated display of all nameplate configuration
# Requires: RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded (via differential furnish)
zrbrn_fleet_survey() {
  zrbcc_sentinel
  zrbgc_sentinel
  zrbgd_sentinel
  zrbrr_sentinel

  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
  local -r z_row_fmt="%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n"
  echo ""
  printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
    "Moniker" "Entry" "WS" "Enc" "Subnet" "Sentry IP" "Bottle IP" "Snt" "Btl"
  printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
    "--------" "-----" "------" "------" "-----------------" "--------------" "--------------" "---" "---"

  local z_sv_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/"*"/${RBCC_rbrn_file}")
  local z_sv_i=""
  for z_sv_i in "${!z_sv_files[@]}"; do
    test -f "${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}" || continue
    (
      source "${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}" || buc_die "Failed to source: ${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}"

      local z_sentry_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}"
      local z_bottle_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}"

      local z_sentry_local="--"
      local z_bottle_local="--"
      if command -v "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_sentry_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_sentry_local="ok"
        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_bottle_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_bottle_local="ok"
      else
        z_sentry_local="??"
        z_bottle_local="??"
      fi

      local z_ws_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
      local z_enc_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"
      if [[ "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" != "enabled" ]]; then
        z_ws_port="-"
        z_enc_port="-"
      fi

      printf "${z_row_fmt}" \
        "${RBRN_MONIKER}" "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" "${z_ws_port}" "${z_enc_port}" \
        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}" \
        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" \
        "${z_sentry_local}" "${z_bottle_local}" || buc_die "Failed to printf survey row"
    ) || buc_die "Survey isolation failed for: ${z_sv_files[$z_sv_i]}"
  done
  echo ""
}

######################################################################
# Command Functions

# Command: validate - enrollment-based validation report
rbrn_validate() {
  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRN nameplate regime configuration via enrollment report"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  if test -z "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
    rbrn_list
    buc_die "Nameplate moniker required"
  fi
  buc_step "Validating RBRN nameplate regime"
  buv_report RBRN "Nameplate Regime"
  buc_step "RBRN nameplate valid"
}

# Command: render - diagnostic display
rbrn_render() {
  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRN nameplate regime configuration"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  if test -z "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
    rbrn_list
    buc_die "Nameplate moniker required"
  fi
  local z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${BUZ_FOLIO}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
  buv_render RBRN "RBRN - Recipe Bottle Regime Nameplate" "${z_nameplate_file}"
}

# Command: survey - fleet info table across all nameplates
rbrn_survey() {
  buc_doc_brief "Display fleet info table for all nameplate configurations"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  zrbrn_fleet_survey
}

# Command: audit - survey display then preflight validation
rbrn_audit() {
  buc_doc_brief "Survey all nameplates and run cross-nameplate preflight validation"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  zrbrn_fleet_survey
  rbrn_preflight
  buc_step "Cross-nameplate audit passed"

  buc_step "Full audit passed (nameplates)"
}

# Command: list - show available nameplate monikers
rbrn_list() {
  buc_doc_brief "List available nameplate monikers"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  local z_monikers
  z_monikers=$(rbrn_list_capture) || buc_die "No nameplates found"
  buc_step "Available nameplates:"
  local z_moniker=""
  for z_moniker in ${z_monikers}; do
    buc_bare "        ${z_moniker}"
  done
}

######################################################################
# Furnish and Main

zrbrn_furnish() {
  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_TOOLS_DIR        " "Project tools root directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env_done || return 0

  local z_command="${1:-}"

  # Light sources (always)
  source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh"
  local z_rbk_kit_dir="${BURD_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buv_validation.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/bupr_PresentationRegime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrn_regime.sh"

  # Heavy sources (survey/audit only)
  case "${z_command}" in
    rbrn_survey|rbrn_audit)
      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrr_regime.sh"
      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh"
      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgl_GarLayout.sh"
      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
      source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgo_OAuth.sh"
      ;;
  esac

  # Light kindles (always)
  zbuv_kindle
  zburd_kindle
  zburd_enforce
  zbupr_kindle
  zrbcc_kindle
  test "${z_rbk_kit_dir}" = "${RBCC_KIT_DIR}" || buc_die "z_rbk_kit_dir mismatch: ${z_rbk_kit_dir} != ${RBCC_KIT_DIR}"

  # Heavy kindles (survey/audit only)
  case "${z_command}" in
    rbrn_survey|rbrn_audit)
      source "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
      zrbgc_kindle
      zrbgl_kindle
      zrbrr_kindle
      zrbrr_enforce
      zrbdc_kindle
      zrbgo_kindle
      zrbgd_kindle
      ;;
  esac

  # If BUZ_FOLIO is set, load and kindle the specified nameplate
  if test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"; then
    local z_nameplate_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${BUZ_FOLIO}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
    test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Nameplate not found: ${z_nameplate_file}"
    source "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source nameplate: ${z_nameplate_file}"
    zrbrn_kindle
    zrbrn_enforce
  fi
}

buc_execute rbrn_ "Recipe Bottle Nameplate Regime" zrbrn_furnish "$@"

# eof

GAR's cleanup background job (executes ~daily on Google's schedule, exact time unspecified) deletes manifests matching this policy on its next run; layer storage is reclaimed by GAR's separate daily layer-GC job. The 86400s (1-day) `olderThan` is measured from manifest creation time, not from when the manifest became untagged — orphans become eligible once they have existed in GAR for at least one day and are reaped on the next subsequent daily cleanup execution.

NOTE: REST schema verified against canonical sources. `cleanupPolicies` is a *map* keyed by policy ID, not an array — the gcloud CLI policy-file format used with `gcloud artifacts repositories set-cleanup-policies --policy=FILE` is a different (array, nested `{type: "Delete"}` action) schema that does not apply to this REST call. `action` is a *string enum* with values `ACTION_UNSPECIFIED | DELETE | KEEP`. `condition.tagState` enum values: `TAGGED | UNTAGGED | ANY`. `condition.olderThan` is a Duration-format string (seconds + `s` suffix). The `tokenCreator` role enables build steps running as {rbtr_mason} (via the build JSON's `serviceAccount` field) to generate fresh access tokens for GCP API calls — required for GAR authentication (docker login, crane push). This is distinct from `serviceAccountUser` (actAs), which the {rbtr_director} holds on {rbtr_mason} for submitting builds.
206	.. {rbbc_require}
207	IAM binding successful

209	//axhos_step
210	. *Submit Per-Pool Probe Builds*:
211	.. For each worker pool variant in [`tether`, `airgap`]:
212	... {rbbc_submit}
213	link:https://cloud.google.com/build/docs/api/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.builds/create[builds.create] with:
214	.... `serviceAccount`: `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»/serviceAccounts/«MASON_EMAIL»`
215	.... `options.pool.name`: full pool resource path for the variant
216	.... `options.logging`: `CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY`
217	.... `steps[0]`: posture-check assertion (builder: `gcr.io/google.com/cloudsdktool/cloud-sdk:alpine`)
218	..... tether asserts `https://example.com` reachable AND `https://storage.googleapis.com` reachable (curl without `-f`; any HTTP response counts as reached)
219	..... airgap asserts `https://example.com` connection blocked AND `https://storage.googleapis.com` reachable
220	.... `steps[1]`: GAR write probe (builder: `gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker`) — `FROM scratch` image with a single marker file, pushed to `«REGION»-docker.pkg.dev/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»/«GAR_REPOSITORY»/rbi_df/probe-«VARIANT»:probe`
221	... {rbbc_require}
222	submission returns HTTP 200/201 (build accepted). All other codes are fatal.
223	... {rbbc_await}
224	build terminal state via `builds.get` polled every `ZRBGP_BUILD_POLL_INTERVAL` seconds, with a `ZRBGP_BUILD_POLL_CEILING` ceiling (10 minutes total). SUCCESS is the expected terminal state on correct posture; FAILURE means the in-build assertion tripped (egress-posture mismatch) and operators investigate via the console link. Any other terminal state (CANCELLED / TIMEOUT / EXPIRED / INTERNAL_ERROR) indicates Cloud Build infrastructure trouble and is similarly diagnostic, not silently accepted.
225	... {rbbc_show}
226	per-pool probe block carrying the pool ID, GAR artifact reference, build ID + Cloud Build console link, and terminal status.
227	.. NOTE: Builder images are Google-hosted only (`gcr.io/...`). The airgap pool cannot reach `docker.io`; any non-Google builder would hang the build.
228	.. NOTE: Submission itself populates the per-pool concurrent-build quota row in Google's Cloud Build console UI — what the preflight diagnostic calls "after some build activity." A SUCCESS terminal probe confirms three things end-to-end: the pool can dispatch builds, the worker exhibits the egress posture stamped into its network config, and the worker can authenticate to GAR and push to `rbi_df`. Operators bump per-pool quota afterward via the now-populated console row to enable subsequent parallel gauntlet activity.
229	.. NOTE: Submission awaits terminal state inline. The two iterations of the loop run serially because the await blocks the loop body before the next submission; this is load-bearing. An earlier non-awaiting variant caused the late-clearing-probe-collision wedge — the airgap probe queued for ~19 minutes behind subsequent gauntlet dispatches, and when it finally cleared, the next tether conjure (e.g., `ordain_conjure_jupyter`) wedged in `QUEUED` until `queueTtl=3600s` expired the build. See `Memos/memo-20260517-cloudbuild-default-quota-wedge/`. The serialized await also makes the airgap probe's slot acquisition fast in the no-contention case, since no other gauntlet builds are competing during the levy window.
230	.. NOTE: In-build posture-assertion failure (e.g., airgap pool reaching the public internet, tether pool unable to resolve `storage.googleapis.com`) surfaces in the build's terminal status as FAILURE — a hard infra-drift signal. The posture-check script uses `curl` without `-f` so that HTTP 4xx/5xx responses from a reached server still count as "reached"; only honest network failures (DNS, connection refused, timeout) trip the assertion.
231	.. NOTE: The `rbi_df` namespace is a flat sibling of `rbi_hm` / `rbi_rq` / `rbi_es` under the GAR repository. {rbtgo_image_audit} / {rbtgo_image_rekon} enumerators ignore it by design — probe artifacts are operational, not part of the hallmark / reliquary / enshrine image catalogue. Filenames under `rbi_df` form a flat sea (no subdirs); each filename names one depot-scoped OCI artifact.
232	
233	//axhoot_typed_output
234	{rbtgi_depot}
235	. *Confirm Depot Creation*:
236	.. {rbbc_show}
237	single-line success banner naming `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` and the
238	{rbtgo_governor_mantle}
239	follow-up hint
240	
241	//axhoot_typed_output
242	{rbtgi_depot}
243	. *Update Depot Tracking*:
244	.. Execute
245	{rbtoe_depot_list_update}
246	to refresh per-moniker depot fact files
247	
248	//axhoc_completion
249	Successful execution creates depot infrastructure with configured build bucket, container repository, Mason service account, and private worker pool — all derived from `(RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX, RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER)`.
250	Proceed to
251	{rbtgo_governor_mantle}
252	to create the
253	{rbtr_governor}
254	for this depot.
255
