1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# RBW Zipper - Colophon registry for RBW workbench dispatch
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion guard
24	test -z "${ZRBZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
25	ZRBZ_SOURCED=1
26	
27	######################################################################
28	# Colophon registry initialization
29	
30	zrbz_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbz already kindled"
32	
33	  # Verify buz zipper is kindled (CLI furnish must kindle buz first)
34	  zbuz_sentinel
35	
36	  # Accounts — Google Cloud service accounts (rbw-a)
37	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_ACCOUNTS   "rbw-a"   "Accounts — Service account management"
38	  local z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
39	  buz_enroll RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR         "rbw-aM"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_governor_mantle"       ""        "Create/replace governor service account"
40	  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
41	  buz_enroll RBZ_INVEST_RETRIEVER        "rbw-arI" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_invest_retriever"      "param1"  "Invest a Retriever service account for an identity"
42	  buz_enroll RBZ_INVEST_DIRECTOR         "rbw-adI" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_invest_director"       "param1"  "Invest a Director service account for an identity"
43	  buz_enroll RBZ_DIVEST_RETRIEVER        "rbw-arD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_divest_retriever"      "param1"  "Divest a Retriever service account by identity"
44	  buz_enroll RBZ_DIVEST_DIRECTOR         "rbw-adD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_divest_director"       "param1"  "Divest a Director service account by identity"
45	  buz_enroll RBZ_ROSTER_RETRIEVERS       "rbw-arr" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_roster_retrievers"     ""        "Roster Retriever service accounts (emit per-identity fact files)"
46	  buz_enroll RBZ_ROSTER_DIRECTORS        "rbw-adr" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_roster_directors"      ""        "Roster Director service accounts (emit per-identity fact files)"
47	
48	  # Crucible — container runtime (rbw-c)
49	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_CRUCIBLE   "rbw-c"   "Crucible — Container runtime"
50	  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
51	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE  "rbw-cC"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_charge"       "imprint"  "Charge crucible (sentry + pentacle + bottle containers)"
52	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH  "rbw-cQ"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_quench"       "imprint"  "Quench crucible"
53	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_SSH     "rbw-cS"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ssh"          "imprint"  "SSH into the bottle container"
54	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_HAIL    "rbw-ch"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_hail"         "param1"   "Shell into the sentry container"
55	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK    "rbw-cr"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_rack"         "param1"   "Shell into the bottle container"
56	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_SCRY    "rbw-cs"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_scry"         "param1"   "Observe network traffic on crucible containers"
57	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_WRIT    "rbw-cw"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_writ"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in sentry container"
58	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_FIAT    "rbw-cf"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_fiat"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in pentacle container"
59	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_BARK    "rbw-cb"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_bark"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in bottle container"
60	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_ACTIVE  "rbw-cic" "${z_mod}" "rbob_charged"      "param1"   "Check if crucible is currently charged"
61	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE "rbw-cKB" "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge_bottle" "param1" "Kludge bottle vessel and drive hallmark into nameplate"
62	  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_SENTRY "rbw-cKS" "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge_sentry" "param1" "Kludge sentry vessel and drive hallmark into nameplate"
63	
64	  # Depot — GCP project infrastructure (rbw-d, UPPER=mutates, lower=read)
65	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_DEPOT      "rbw-d"   "Depot — GCP project infrastructure"
66	  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
67	  buz_enroll RBZ_LEVY_DEPOT             "rbw-dL"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_levy"   ""  "Provision GCP depot project"
68	  buz_enroll RBZ_UNMAKE_DEPOT           "rbw-dU"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_unmake"  "param1"  "Permanently remove a depot (operator supplies depot project ID)"
69	  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_DEPOT             "rbw-dl"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_list"    ""  "List all active depots"
70	  buz_enroll RBZ_INFO_DEPOT             "rbw-di"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_info"    ""  "Run egress posture checks against the live depot's worker pools"
71	  z_mod="rbfd_cli.sh"
72	  buz_enroll RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL        "rbw-dE"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_enshrine"      "param1"  "Enshrine upstream base images to GAR via Cloud Build"
73	  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
74	  buz_enroll RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY     "rbw-dI"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_inscribe"      ""  "Create reliquary: mirror tool images from upstream to GAR"
75	  buz_enroll RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY         "rbw-dY"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_yoke"          "param1"  "Yoke a reliquary stamp into every vessel's rbrv.env (wildcard fan-out)"
76	
77	  # Guide — human-directed procedures (rbw-g)
78	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_GUIDE      "rbw-g"   "Guide — Human-directed procedures"
79	  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
80	  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL          "rbw-gPI" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_payor_install"   "param1"  "Ingest OAuth credentials from JSON key file"
81	  z_mod="rbh0/rbhp0_cli.sh"
82	  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH        "rbw-gPE" "${z_mod}" "rbhp_establish"       ""  "Guided Manor establishment — GCP project + OAuth consent screen"
83	  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH          "rbw-gPR" "${z_mod}" "rbhp_refresh"         ""  "Refresh expired OAuth tokens"
84	  buz_enroll RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD            "rbw-gq"  "${z_mod}" "rbhp_quota_build"     ""  "Display Cloud Build capacity review procedure"
85	  # Onboarding — handbook tracks (rbw-o terminal + rbw-O* family, see ₣A6 paddock)
86	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_ONBOARDING "rbw-o"   "Onboarding — Handbook restart"
87	  z_mod="rbh0/rbho0_cli.sh"
88	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE    "rbw-o"   "${z_mod}" "rbho_start_here"            ""  "Onboarding start — probe-aware menu into handbook tracks"
89	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRASH_COURSE  "rbw-Occ" "${z_mod}" "rbho_crash_course"          ""  "Crash Course — universal prerequisite: tabtargets, regimes, diagnostic failure"
90	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_RETRIEVER "rbw-Ocr" "${z_mod}" "rbho_credential_retriever" ""  "Install retriever credentials — place RBRA key file"
91	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR  "rbw-Ocd" "${z_mod}" "rbho_credential_director"  ""  "Install director credentials — place RBRA key file"
92	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_FIRST_CRUCIBLE "rbw-Ofc" "${z_mod}" "rbho_first_crucible"       ""  "Start a Crucible using local builds — kludge, charge, rack"
93	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_TADMOR_SECURITY "rbw-Ots" "${z_mod}" "rbho_tadmor_security"     ""  "Verify Crucible containment under attack — charge tadmor and run the adversarial suite"
94	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_FIRST_BUILD "rbw-Odf" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_first_build" "" "Your First Cloud Build — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
95	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_AIRGAP     "rbw-Oda" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_airgap"      ""  "Airgap Cloud Build — enshrine, conjure base, conjure airgap, charge moriah, compare plumb"
96	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_BIND       "rbw-Odb" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_bind"        ""  "Bind Cloud Build — pin upstream image by digest, mode-mixture pluml Crucible"
97	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_GRAFT      "rbw-Odg" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_graft"       ""  "Graft Cloud Build — push locally-built image, inspect GRAFTED Vouch verdict"
98	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB      "rbw-Op"  "${z_mod}" "rbho_payor_handbook"       ""  "Payor — establish a Manor and provision the Depot"
99	  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_GOVERNOR_HB   "rbw-Og"  "${z_mod}" "rbho_governor_handbook"    ""  "Governor — administer service accounts for directors and retrievers"
100	
101	  # Foundry — registry artifact lifecycle (rbw-f, UPPER=mutates GAR, lower=read/local)
102	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_FOUNDRY    "rbw-f"   "Foundry — Registry artifact lifecycle"
103	  z_mod="rbfd_cli.sh"
104	  buz_enroll RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK        "rbw-fO"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_ordain"          "param1"  "Ordain hallmark: conjure, bind, or graft based on vessel mode"
105	  buz_enroll RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL          "rbw-fk"  "rbfk_cli.sh" "rbfk_kludge"       "param1"  "Kludge a vessel image locally for development"
106	  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
107	  buz_enroll RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK        "rbw-fA"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_abjure"          "param1"  "Abjure a hallmark (delete artifacts from GAR)"
108	  buz_enroll RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS        "rbw-ft"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_tally"           ""  "Tally hallmarks by health state"
109	  z_mod="rbfv_cli.sh"
110	  buz_enroll RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS        "rbw-fV"  "${z_mod}" "rbfv_batch_vouch"     ""  "Mode-aware vouch: SLSA (conjure), digest-pin (bind), GRAFTED (graft)"
111	  z_mod="rbfr_cli.sh"
112	  buz_enroll RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK        "rbw-fs"  "${z_mod}" "rbfr_summon"          "param1"  "Summon vouched hallmark image locally"
113	  z_mod="rbfc_cli.sh"
114	  buz_enroll RBZ_PLUMB_FULL             "rbw-fpf" "${z_mod}" "rbfc_plumb_full"      "param1"  "Full provenance display (SBOM, build info, Dockerfile)"
115	  buz_enroll RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT          "rbw-fpc" "${z_mod}" "rbfc_plumb_compact"   "param1"  "Compact provenance summary"
116	  z_mod="rbfh_cli.sh"
117	  buz_enroll RBZ_HYGIENE_CHECK_DOCKERFILE "rbw-fhc" "${z_mod}" "rbfh_check"         "param1"  "Check a Dockerfile against the FROM-line hygiene contract"
118	  buz_enroll RBZ_HYGIENE_CHECK_VESSEL   "rbw-fhv" "${z_mod}" "rbfh_check_vessel"    "param1"  "Check a vessel's conjure Dockerfile against the FROM-line hygiene contract"
119	
120	  # Ifrit — attack binary (rbw-I)
121	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_IFRIT      "rbw-I"   "Ifrit — Attack binary"
122	  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
123	  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_IFRIT   "rbw-Ic"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ifrit_client"  "imprint"  "Launch Claude Code inside a running bottle for escape testing"
124	  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_SORTIE  "rbw-Is"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ifrit_sortie"  "imprint"  "Run automated security test scripts inside the bottle"
125	
126	  # Image — container image operations (rbw-i, UPPER=mutates, lower=read)
127	  # Three-domain symmetric: hallmarks (h), reliquaries (r), enshrinements (e).
128	  # Verbs: rekon (member-list), audit (catalog-list), Jettison (delete), wrest (pull).
129	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_IMAGE      "rbw-i"   "Image — Container image operations"
130	  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
131	  buz_enroll RBZ_REKON_HALLMARK         "rbw-irh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_rekon_hallmark"        "param1"  "List ark basenames present under a hallmark's GAR subtree"
132	  buz_enroll RBZ_REKON_RELIQUARY        "rbw-irr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_rekon_reliquary"       "param1"  "List tool images present under a reliquary stamp's GAR subtree"
133	  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_HALLMARKS        "rbw-iah" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_hallmarks"       ""  "Audit hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers"
134	  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_RELIQUARIES      "rbw-iar" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_reliquaries"     ""  "Audit reliquaries — list all reliquary stamps"
135	  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_ENSHRINEMENTS    "rbw-iae" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_enshrinements"   ""  "Audit enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors"
136	  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_HALLMARK_IMAGE   "rbw-iwh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest a hallmark image from registry"
137	  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_RELIQUARY_IMAGE  "rbw-iwr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest a reliquary tool image from registry"
138	  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_ENSHRINED_IMAGE  "rbw-iwe" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest an enshrined base image from registry"
139	  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_HALLMARK_IMAGE  "rbw-iJh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison a hallmark image tag from registry"
140	  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_RELIQUARY_IMAGE "rbw-iJr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison a reliquary tool image from registry"
141	  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_ENSHRINEMENT    "rbw-iJe" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison an enshrinement from registry"
142	
143	  # Marshal — lifecycle (rbw-M)
144	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_MARSHAL    "rbw-M"   "Marshal — Lifecycle"
145	  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_ZERO           "rbw-MZ"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_zero"      ""  "Zero regime to blank template"
146	  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_PROOF          "rbw-MP"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_proof"     ""  "Proof repo for release testing"
147	  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_GENERATE       "rbw-MG"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_generate"  ""  "Generate tabtarget context from zipper registry"
148	
149	  # Nameplate — cross-nameplate operations (rbw-n)
150	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_NAMEPLATE  "rbw-n"   "Nameplate — Cross-nameplate operations"
151	  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
152	  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_NAMEPLATES        "rbw-rnl" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_list"    ""  "List all nameplates"
153	  buz_enroll RBZ_SURVEY_NAMEPLATES      "rbw-ni"  "${z_mod}" "rbrn_survey"  ""  "Survey nameplate status"
154	  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_NAMEPLATES       "rbw-nv"  "${z_mod}" "rbrn_audit"   ""  "Validate all nameplates"
155	
156	  # Regime — config files (rbw-r)
157	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_REGIME     "rbw-r"   "Regime — Config files"
158	  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
159	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_NAMEPLATE       "rbw-rnr" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_render"    "param1"  "Render nameplate regime"
160	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_NAMEPLATE     "rbw-rnv" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_validate"  "param1"  "Validate nameplate regime"
161	  z_mod="rbrv_cli.sh"
162	  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_VESSELS           "rbw-rvl" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_list"      ""        "List vessel regimes"
163	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_VESSEL          "rbw-rvr" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_render"    "param1"  "Render vessel regime"
164	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_VESSEL        "rbw-rvv" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_validate"  "param1"  "Validate vessel regime"
165	  z_mod="rbrr_cli.sh"
166	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_REPO            "rbw-rrr" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_render"    ""  "Render repo regime"
167	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_REPO          "rbw-rrv" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_validate"  ""  "Validate repo regime"
168	  z_mod="rbrp_cli.sh"
169	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_PAYOR           "rbw-rpr" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_render"    ""  "Render payor regime"
170	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_PAYOR         "rbw-rpv" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_validate"  ""  "Validate payor regime"
171	  z_mod="rbro_cli.sh"
172	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_OAUTH           "rbw-ror" "${z_mod}" "rbro_render"    ""  "Render OAuth regime"
173	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_OAUTH         "rbw-rov" "${z_mod}" "rbro_validate"  ""  "Validate OAuth regime"
174	  z_mod="rbrs_cli.sh"
175	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_STATION         "rbw-rsr" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_render"    ""  "Render station regime"
176	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_STATION       "rbw-rsv" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_validate"  ""  "Validate station regime"
177	  z_mod="rbra_cli.sh"
178	  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_AUTH            "rbw-rar" "${z_mod}" "rbra_render"    "param1"  "Render auth regime"
179	  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH          "rbw-rav" "${z_mod}" "rbra_validate"  "param1"  "Validate auth regime"
180	  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_AUTH              "rbw-ral" "${z_mod}" "rbra_list"      ""        "List auth regimes"
181	
182	  # Theurge — test infrastructure (rbw-t)
183	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_THEURGE    "rbw-t"   "Theurge — Test infrastructure"
184	  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
185	  buz_enroll RBZ_THEURGE_KLUDGE  "rbw-tK"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge"        "imprint"  "Local kludge build + install hallmark into nameplate"
186	  buz_enroll RBZ_THEURGE_ORDAIN  "rbw-tO"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ordain"        "imprint"  "Cloud build + install hallmark into nameplate"
187	  z_mod="rbq_cli.sh"
188	  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_FAST     "rbw-tf"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_fast"     ""        "Fast qualify: tabtargets, colophons, nameplate health"
189	  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_RELEASE  "rbw-tr"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_release"  ""        "Release qualify: + shellcheck, full test suite"
190	  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_PRISTINE "rbw-tP"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_pristine" ""        "Pristine qualify: gauntlet test suite (release gate)"
191	
192	  # Handbook — human-facing procedures (rbw-h0 index, rbw-hw/HW* windows)
193	  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_HANDBOOK   "rbw-HW"  "Handbook — Human-facing procedures"
194	  z_mod="rbh0/rbhw0_cli.sh"
195	  buz_enroll RBZ_HANDBOOK_TOP           "rbw-h0"    "${z_mod}" "rbhw_handbook_top"              ""        "Top-level handbook index across all groups"
196	  buz_enroll RBZ_HANDBOOK_WINDOWS       "rbw-hw"    "${z_mod}" "rbhw_top"                       ""        "Windows test infrastructure orchestrator"
197	  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_DESKTOP     "rbw-HWdd"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_desktop"            ""        "Docker Desktop install"
198	  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_CONTEXT     "rbw-HWdc"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_context_discipline" ""        "Deterministic daemon selection"
199	
200	  readonly ZRBZ_COLOPHON_MANIFEST="${z_buz_colophon_roll[*]}"
201	
202	  readonly ZRBZ_KINDLED=1
203	}
204	
205	######################################################################
206	# Healthcheck (validates all enrolled tabtargets exist on disk)
207	
208	zrbz_healthcheck() {
209	  zrbz_sentinel
210	  buz_healthcheck
211	}
212	
213	######################################################################
214	# Internal sentinel
215	
216	zrbz_sentinel() {
217	  test "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbz not kindled - call zrbz_kindle first"
218	}
219	
220	# eof
221

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# RBW Zipper - Colophon registry for RBW workbench dispatch

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion guard
test -z "${ZRBZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
ZRBZ_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Colophon registry initialization

zrbz_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbz already kindled"

  # Verify buz zipper is kindled (CLI furnish must kindle buz first)
  zbuz_sentinel

  # Accounts — Google Cloud service accounts (rbw-a)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_ACCOUNTS   "rbw-a"   "Accounts — Service account management"
  local z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR         "rbw-aM"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_governor_mantle"       ""        "Create/replace governor service account"
  z_mod="rbgg_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_INVEST_RETRIEVER        "rbw-arI" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_invest_retriever"      "param1"  "Invest a Retriever service account for an identity"
  buz_enroll RBZ_INVEST_DIRECTOR         "rbw-adI" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_invest_director"       "param1"  "Invest a Director service account for an identity"
  buz_enroll RBZ_DIVEST_RETRIEVER        "rbw-arD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_divest_retriever"      "param1"  "Divest a Retriever service account by identity"
  buz_enroll RBZ_DIVEST_DIRECTOR         "rbw-adD" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_divest_director"       "param1"  "Divest a Director service account by identity"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ROSTER_RETRIEVERS       "rbw-arr" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_roster_retrievers"     ""        "Roster Retriever service accounts (emit per-identity fact files)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ROSTER_DIRECTORS        "rbw-adr" "${z_mod}" "rbgg_roster_directors"      ""        "Roster Director service accounts (emit per-identity fact files)"

  # Crucible — container runtime (rbw-c)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_CRUCIBLE   "rbw-c"   "Crucible — Container runtime"
  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE  "rbw-cC"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_charge"       "imprint"  "Charge crucible (sentry + pentacle + bottle containers)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH  "rbw-cQ"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_quench"       "imprint"  "Quench crucible"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_SSH     "rbw-cS"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ssh"          "imprint"  "SSH into the bottle container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_HAIL    "rbw-ch"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_hail"         "param1"   "Shell into the sentry container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK    "rbw-cr"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_rack"         "param1"   "Shell into the bottle container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_SCRY    "rbw-cs"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_scry"         "param1"   "Observe network traffic on crucible containers"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_WRIT    "rbw-cw"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_writ"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in sentry container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_FIAT    "rbw-cf"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_fiat"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in pentacle container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_BARK    "rbw-cb"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_bark"         "imprint"  "Non-interactive exec in bottle container"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_ACTIVE  "rbw-cic" "${z_mod}" "rbob_charged"      "param1"   "Check if crucible is currently charged"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE "rbw-cKB" "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge_bottle" "param1" "Kludge bottle vessel and drive hallmark into nameplate"
  buz_enroll RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_SENTRY "rbw-cKS" "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge_sentry" "param1" "Kludge sentry vessel and drive hallmark into nameplate"

  # Depot — GCP project infrastructure (rbw-d, UPPER=mutates, lower=read)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_DEPOT      "rbw-d"   "Depot — GCP project infrastructure"
  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LEVY_DEPOT             "rbw-dL"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_levy"   ""  "Provision GCP depot project"
  buz_enroll RBZ_UNMAKE_DEPOT           "rbw-dU"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_unmake"  "param1"  "Permanently remove a depot (operator supplies depot project ID)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_DEPOT             "rbw-dl"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_list"    ""  "List all active depots"
  buz_enroll RBZ_INFO_DEPOT             "rbw-di"  "${z_mod}" "rbgp_depot_info"    ""  "Run egress posture checks against the live depot's worker pools"
  z_mod="rbfd_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL        "rbw-dE"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_enshrine"      "param1"  "Enshrine upstream base images to GAR via Cloud Build"
  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY     "rbw-dI"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_inscribe"      ""  "Create reliquary: mirror tool images from upstream to GAR"
  buz_enroll RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY         "rbw-dY"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_yoke"          "param1"  "Yoke a reliquary stamp into every vessel's rbrv.env (wildcard fan-out)"

  # Guide — human-directed procedures (rbw-g)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_GUIDE      "rbw-g"   "Guide — Human-directed procedures"
  z_mod="rbgp_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL          "rbw-gPI" "${z_mod}" "rbgp_payor_install"   "param1"  "Ingest OAuth credentials from JSON key file"
  z_mod="rbh0/rbhp0_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH        "rbw-gPE" "${z_mod}" "rbhp_establish"       ""  "Guided Manor establishment — GCP project + OAuth consent screen"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH          "rbw-gPR" "${z_mod}" "rbhp_refresh"         ""  "Refresh expired OAuth tokens"
  buz_enroll RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD            "rbw-gq"  "${z_mod}" "rbhp_quota_build"     ""  "Display Cloud Build capacity review procedure"
  # Onboarding — handbook tracks (rbw-o terminal + rbw-O* family, see ₣A6 paddock)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_ONBOARDING "rbw-o"   "Onboarding — Handbook restart"
  z_mod="rbh0/rbho0_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE    "rbw-o"   "${z_mod}" "rbho_start_here"            ""  "Onboarding start — probe-aware menu into handbook tracks"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRASH_COURSE  "rbw-Occ" "${z_mod}" "rbho_crash_course"          ""  "Crash Course — universal prerequisite: tabtargets, regimes, diagnostic failure"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_RETRIEVER "rbw-Ocr" "${z_mod}" "rbho_credential_retriever" ""  "Install retriever credentials — place RBRA key file"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR  "rbw-Ocd" "${z_mod}" "rbho_credential_director"  ""  "Install director credentials — place RBRA key file"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_FIRST_CRUCIBLE "rbw-Ofc" "${z_mod}" "rbho_first_crucible"       ""  "Start a Crucible using local builds — kludge, charge, rack"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_TADMOR_SECURITY "rbw-Ots" "${z_mod}" "rbho_tadmor_security"     ""  "Verify Crucible containment under attack — charge tadmor and run the adversarial suite"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_FIRST_BUILD "rbw-Odf" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_first_build" "" "Your First Cloud Build — inscribe, conjure, tour, summon, abjure"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_AIRGAP     "rbw-Oda" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_airgap"      ""  "Airgap Cloud Build — enshrine, conjure base, conjure airgap, charge moriah, compare plumb"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_BIND       "rbw-Odb" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_bind"        ""  "Bind Cloud Build — pin upstream image by digest, mode-mixture pluml Crucible"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_DIR_GRAFT      "rbw-Odg" "${z_mod}" "rbho_director_graft"       ""  "Graft Cloud Build — push locally-built image, inspect GRAFTED Vouch verdict"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB      "rbw-Op"  "${z_mod}" "rbho_payor_handbook"       ""  "Payor — establish a Manor and provision the Depot"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ONBOARD_GOVERNOR_HB   "rbw-Og"  "${z_mod}" "rbho_governor_handbook"    ""  "Governor — administer service accounts for directors and retrievers"

  # Foundry — registry artifact lifecycle (rbw-f, UPPER=mutates GAR, lower=read/local)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_FOUNDRY    "rbw-f"   "Foundry — Registry artifact lifecycle"
  z_mod="rbfd_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK        "rbw-fO"  "${z_mod}" "rbfd_ordain"          "param1"  "Ordain hallmark: conjure, bind, or graft based on vessel mode"
  buz_enroll RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL          "rbw-fk"  "rbfk_cli.sh" "rbfk_kludge"       "param1"  "Kludge a vessel image locally for development"
  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK        "rbw-fA"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_abjure"          "param1"  "Abjure a hallmark (delete artifacts from GAR)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS        "rbw-ft"  "${z_mod}" "rbfl_tally"           ""  "Tally hallmarks by health state"
  z_mod="rbfv_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS        "rbw-fV"  "${z_mod}" "rbfv_batch_vouch"     ""  "Mode-aware vouch: SLSA (conjure), digest-pin (bind), GRAFTED (graft)"
  z_mod="rbfr_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_SUMMON_HALLMARK        "rbw-fs"  "${z_mod}" "rbfr_summon"          "param1"  "Summon vouched hallmark image locally"
  z_mod="rbfc_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PLUMB_FULL             "rbw-fpf" "${z_mod}" "rbfc_plumb_full"      "param1"  "Full provenance display (SBOM, build info, Dockerfile)"
  buz_enroll RBZ_PLUMB_COMPACT          "rbw-fpc" "${z_mod}" "rbfc_plumb_compact"   "param1"  "Compact provenance summary"
  z_mod="rbfh_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HYGIENE_CHECK_DOCKERFILE "rbw-fhc" "${z_mod}" "rbfh_check"         "param1"  "Check a Dockerfile against the FROM-line hygiene contract"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HYGIENE_CHECK_VESSEL   "rbw-fhv" "${z_mod}" "rbfh_check_vessel"    "param1"  "Check a vessel's conjure Dockerfile against the FROM-line hygiene contract"

  # Ifrit — attack binary (rbw-I)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_IFRIT      "rbw-I"   "Ifrit — Attack binary"
  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_IFRIT   "rbw-Ic"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ifrit_client"  "imprint"  "Launch Claude Code inside a running bottle for escape testing"
  buz_enroll RBZ_BOTTLE_SORTIE  "rbw-Is"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ifrit_sortie"  "imprint"  "Run automated security test scripts inside the bottle"

  # Image — container image operations (rbw-i, UPPER=mutates, lower=read)
  # Three-domain symmetric: hallmarks (h), reliquaries (r), enshrinements (e).
  # Verbs: rekon (member-list), audit (catalog-list), Jettison (delete), wrest (pull).
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_IMAGE      "rbw-i"   "Image — Container image operations"
  z_mod="rbfl_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_REKON_HALLMARK         "rbw-irh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_rekon_hallmark"        "param1"  "List ark basenames present under a hallmark's GAR subtree"
  buz_enroll RBZ_REKON_RELIQUARY        "rbw-irr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_rekon_reliquary"       "param1"  "List tool images present under a reliquary stamp's GAR subtree"
  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_HALLMARKS        "rbw-iah" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_hallmarks"       ""  "Audit hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers"
  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_RELIQUARIES      "rbw-iar" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_reliquaries"     ""  "Audit reliquaries — list all reliquary stamps"
  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_ENSHRINEMENTS    "rbw-iae" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_audit_enshrinements"   ""  "Audit enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors"
  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_HALLMARK_IMAGE   "rbw-iwh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest a hallmark image from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_RELIQUARY_IMAGE  "rbw-iwr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest a reliquary tool image from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_WREST_ENSHRINED_IMAGE  "rbw-iwe" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_wrest"                 "param1"  "Wrest an enshrined base image from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_HALLMARK_IMAGE  "rbw-iJh" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison a hallmark image tag from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_RELIQUARY_IMAGE "rbw-iJr" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison a reliquary tool image from registry"
  buz_enroll RBZ_JETTISON_ENSHRINEMENT    "rbw-iJe" "${z_mod}" "rbfl_jettison"            "param1"  "Jettison an enshrinement from registry"

  # Marshal — lifecycle (rbw-M)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_MARSHAL    "rbw-M"   "Marshal — Lifecycle"
  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_ZERO           "rbw-MZ"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_zero"      ""  "Zero regime to blank template"
  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_PROOF          "rbw-MP"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_proof"     ""  "Proof repo for release testing"
  buz_enroll RBZ_MARSHAL_GENERATE       "rbw-MG"  "rblm_cli.sh" "rblm_generate"  ""  "Generate tabtarget context from zipper registry"

  # Nameplate — cross-nameplate operations (rbw-n)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_NAMEPLATE  "rbw-n"   "Nameplate — Cross-nameplate operations"
  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_NAMEPLATES        "rbw-rnl" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_list"    ""  "List all nameplates"
  buz_enroll RBZ_SURVEY_NAMEPLATES      "rbw-ni"  "${z_mod}" "rbrn_survey"  ""  "Survey nameplate status"
  buz_enroll RBZ_AUDIT_NAMEPLATES       "rbw-nv"  "${z_mod}" "rbrn_audit"   ""  "Validate all nameplates"

  # Regime — config files (rbw-r)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_REGIME     "rbw-r"   "Regime — Config files"
  z_mod="rbrn_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_NAMEPLATE       "rbw-rnr" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_render"    "param1"  "Render nameplate regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_NAMEPLATE     "rbw-rnv" "${z_mod}" "rbrn_validate"  "param1"  "Validate nameplate regime"
  z_mod="rbrv_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_VESSELS           "rbw-rvl" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_list"      ""        "List vessel regimes"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_VESSEL          "rbw-rvr" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_render"    "param1"  "Render vessel regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_VESSEL        "rbw-rvv" "${z_mod}" "rbrv_validate"  "param1"  "Validate vessel regime"
  z_mod="rbrr_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_REPO            "rbw-rrr" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_render"    ""  "Render repo regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_REPO          "rbw-rrv" "${z_mod}" "rbrr_validate"  ""  "Validate repo regime"
  z_mod="rbrp_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_PAYOR           "rbw-rpr" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_render"    ""  "Render payor regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_PAYOR         "rbw-rpv" "${z_mod}" "rbrp_validate"  ""  "Validate payor regime"
  z_mod="rbro_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_OAUTH           "rbw-ror" "${z_mod}" "rbro_render"    ""  "Render OAuth regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_OAUTH         "rbw-rov" "${z_mod}" "rbro_validate"  ""  "Validate OAuth regime"
  z_mod="rbrs_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_STATION         "rbw-rsr" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_render"    ""  "Render station regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_STATION       "rbw-rsv" "${z_mod}" "rbrs_validate"  ""  "Validate station regime"
  z_mod="rbra_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_RENDER_AUTH            "rbw-rar" "${z_mod}" "rbra_render"    "param1"  "Render auth regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH          "rbw-rav" "${z_mod}" "rbra_validate"  "param1"  "Validate auth regime"
  buz_enroll RBZ_LIST_AUTH              "rbw-ral" "${z_mod}" "rbra_list"      ""        "List auth regimes"

  # Theurge — test infrastructure (rbw-t)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_THEURGE    "rbw-t"   "Theurge — Test infrastructure"
  z_mod="rbob_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_THEURGE_KLUDGE  "rbw-tK"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_kludge"        "imprint"  "Local kludge build + install hallmark into nameplate"
  buz_enroll RBZ_THEURGE_ORDAIN  "rbw-tO"  "${z_mod}" "rbob_ordain"        "imprint"  "Cloud build + install hallmark into nameplate"
  z_mod="rbq_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_FAST     "rbw-tf"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_fast"     ""        "Fast qualify: tabtargets, colophons, nameplate health"
  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_RELEASE  "rbw-tr"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_release"  ""        "Release qualify: + shellcheck, full test suite"
  buz_enroll RBZ_QUALIFY_PRISTINE "rbw-tP"   "${z_mod}" "rbq_qualify_pristine" ""        "Pristine qualify: gauntlet test suite (release gate)"

  # Handbook — human-facing procedures (rbw-h0 index, rbw-hw/HW* windows)
  buz_group RBZ__GROUP_HANDBOOK   "rbw-HW"  "Handbook — Human-facing procedures"
  z_mod="rbh0/rbhw0_cli.sh"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HANDBOOK_TOP           "rbw-h0"    "${z_mod}" "rbhw_handbook_top"              ""        "Top-level handbook index across all groups"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HANDBOOK_WINDOWS       "rbw-hw"    "${z_mod}" "rbhw_top"                       ""        "Windows test infrastructure orchestrator"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_DESKTOP     "rbw-HWdd"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_desktop"            ""        "Docker Desktop install"
  buz_enroll RBZ_HW_DOCKER_CONTEXT     "rbw-HWdc"  "${z_mod}" "rbhw_docker_context_discipline" ""        "Deterministic daemon selection"

  readonly ZRBZ_COLOPHON_MANIFEST="${z_buz_colophon_roll[*]}"

  readonly ZRBZ_KINDLED=1
}

######################################################################
# Healthcheck (validates all enrolled tabtargets exist on disk)

zrbz_healthcheck() {
  zrbz_sentinel
  buz_healthcheck
}

######################################################################
# Internal sentinel

zrbz_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbz not kindled - call zrbz_kindle first"
}

# eof

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Common Constants - File paths and naming conventions
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBCC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbcc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBCC_SOURCED=1
26	
27	# Source RBBC bootstrap constants (source-time, before kindle)
28	test -n "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_CONFIG_DIR not set - rbcc requires launcher environment"
29	source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh" || buc_die "Failed to source rbbc_constants.sh"
30	
31	# Literal constants (pure string literals, no variable expansion — available at source time)
32	RBCC_rbrs_file="../station-files/rbrs.env"
33	RBCC_rbrn_file="rbrn.env"
34	RBCC_rbra_file="rbra.env"
35	RBCC_rbro_file="rbro.env"
36	RBCC_role_governor="governor"
37	RBCC_role_retriever="retriever"
38	RBCC_role_director="director"
39	RBCC_role_payor="payor"
40	RBCC_role_assay="assay"
41	RBCC_role_mason="mason"
42	RBCC_onboarding_nameplate="tadmor"
43	
44	# Cult-verb tinder — used by SA-management surface (invest/divest/roster) and
45	# composed into fact-extension constants below.
46	RBCC_verb_invest="invest"
47	RBCC_verb_divest="divest"
48	RBCC_verb_roster="roster"
49	
50	# Fact-file extension tinder — multi-fact registry for buf_write_fact_multi.
51	# Producers emit "<basename>.<extension>" via filesystem-as-data-bus pattern;
52	# consumers walk fact files in BURD_OUTPUT_DIR / BURD_TEMP_DIR keyed on extension.
53	# Roster extensions composed from earlier tinder (BCG tinder-on-tinder).
54	RBCC_fact_ext_depot="depot"
55	RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project="depot-project"
56	RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever="${RBCC_verb_roster}-${RBCC_role_retriever}"
57	RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director="${RBCC_verb_roster}-${RBCC_role_director}"
58	RBCC_fact_ext_audit_hallmark="audit-hallmark"
59	
60	######################################################################
61	# Internal Functions (zrbcc_*)
62	
63	zrbcc_kindle() {
64	  test -z "${ZRBCC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbcc already kindled"
65	  test -n "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURC_TOOLS_DIR not set - rbcc requires BURC environment"
66	
67	  # Kindle constants (depend on runtime state)
68	  readonly RBCC_KIT_DIR="${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"
69	
70	  # Curl timeout bounds — all actionable curl sites use these
71	  readonly RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC=10
72	  readonly RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC=60
73	
74	  readonly ZRBCC_KINDLED=1
75	}
76	
77	zrbcc_sentinel() {
78	  test "${ZRBCC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbcc not kindled - call zrbcc_kindle first"
79	}
80	
81	# eof
82

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Common Constants - File paths and naming conventions

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBCC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbcc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBCC_SOURCED=1

# Source RBBC bootstrap constants (source-time, before kindle)
test -n "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_CONFIG_DIR not set - rbcc requires launcher environment"
source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh" || buc_die "Failed to source rbbc_constants.sh"

# Literal constants (pure string literals, no variable expansion — available at source time)
RBCC_rbrs_file="../station-files/rbrs.env"
RBCC_rbrn_file="rbrn.env"
RBCC_rbra_file="rbra.env"
RBCC_rbro_file="rbro.env"
RBCC_role_governor="governor"
RBCC_role_retriever="retriever"
RBCC_role_director="director"
RBCC_role_payor="payor"
RBCC_role_assay="assay"
RBCC_role_mason="mason"
RBCC_onboarding_nameplate="tadmor"

# Cult-verb tinder — used by SA-management surface (invest/divest/roster) and
# composed into fact-extension constants below.
RBCC_verb_invest="invest"
RBCC_verb_divest="divest"
RBCC_verb_roster="roster"

# Fact-file extension tinder — multi-fact registry for buf_write_fact_multi.
# Producers emit "<basename>.<extension>" via filesystem-as-data-bus pattern;
# consumers walk fact files in BURD_OUTPUT_DIR / BURD_TEMP_DIR keyed on extension.
# Roster extensions composed from earlier tinder (BCG tinder-on-tinder).
RBCC_fact_ext_depot="depot"
RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project="depot-project"
RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever="${RBCC_verb_roster}-${RBCC_role_retriever}"
RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director="${RBCC_verb_roster}-${RBCC_role_director}"
RBCC_fact_ext_audit_hallmark="audit-hallmark"

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbcc_*)

zrbcc_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBCC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbcc already kindled"
  test -n "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURC_TOOLS_DIR not set - rbcc requires BURC environment"

  # Kindle constants (depend on runtime state)
  readonly RBCC_KIT_DIR="${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"

  # Curl timeout bounds — all actionable curl sites use these
  readonly RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC=10
  readonly RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC=60

  readonly ZRBCC_KINDLED=1
}

zrbcc_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBCC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbcc not kindled - call zrbcc_kindle first"
}

# eof

content.subject: Investigate archetype + survey consumers
content.description: Read sibling regime archetype files (rblm_cli, rbgc, RBSRR, RBSRP, RBSDE) and survey all consumers of the four moved vars

content.subject: Mint rbrd_regime.sh + rbrd_cli.sh
content.description: Create the regime/cli pair following the sibling archetype with the four moved variables

content.subject: Update rbrr_regime.sh to remove four moved vars
content.description: Strip CLOUD_PREFIX, DEPOT_MONIKER, GCP_REGION, GCB_MACHINE_TYPE plus their custom format checks (and joint-length cap)

content.subject: Migrate consumers to RBRD_*
content.description: Rename RBRR_* → RBRD_* at every consumer (rbgp_Payor, rbdc_DerivedConstants, rbgc_Constants, rbgd_DepotConstants, rbgv_AccessProbe, rbfd_FoundryDirectorBuild, rbh0/*, test fixtures rbtdrf/rbtdrk/rbtdrp)

content.subject: Create RBSRT-RegimeDepot.adoc spec
content.description: New spec paralleling RBSRP/RBSRR; update RBS0 index

content.subject: Update affected spec/adoc files
content.description: RBSDE-depot_levy, RBSRR-RegimeRepo (strip), RBSDY, RBSDI, RBSDK, RBSRK, RBSAJ, RBSIA, RBSIR, RBSIW, RBSTB, RBSGM — anywhere RBRR_{four vars} appear

content.subject: Update rblm marshal to emit rbrd.env blank
content.description: Lifecycle marshal generates blank rbrd.env alongside rbrr.env

content.subject: Add rbw-rdr / rbw-rdv tabtargets via zipper
content.description: Enroll Render and Validate depot regime commands

content.subject: Refresh stale rbi_df comment in rbgc_Constants
content.description: Update the "future RBRD in rbi_df" comment block to reflect that RBRD ships as its own image at separate tag

content.subject: Update README + handbook
content.description: README regime list/tree/appendix mention RBRD; handbook surfaces new regime category

content.subject: Validate by running rbw-rdr/rbw-rdv + qualify-fast
content.description: Run validation tabtargets to confirm clean operation, then qualify-fast or test suite

content.text: Investigation complete — clear shape now. Let me start minting.

zrbrd_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBRD_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrd already kindled"

  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.

  # Enroll all RBRD variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering

  buv_regime_enroll RBRD

  buv_group_enroll "Depot Identity"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX         2   11  "Prefix for cloud-visible resource names (depot project, GAR repo, GCS bucket, pool stem)"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER        1   26  "Depot moniker — paired with CLOUD_PREFIX to derive depot project ID, GAR repo, pool stem, and bucket"

  buv_group_enroll "GCP Region"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRD_GCP_REGION           1   32  "GCP region"

  buv_group_enroll "Google Cloud Build Pool"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE     3   64  "Machine type for Cloud Build private worker pool (CE format)"

  # Guard against unexpected RBRD_ variables not in enrollment
  buv_scope_sentinel RBRD RBRD_

  # Lock all enrolled RBRD_ variables against mutation
  buv_lock RBRD

  readonly ZRBRD_KINDLED=1
}

zrbrd_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBRD_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrd not kindled - call zrbrd_kindle first"
}

# Enforce all RBRD enrollment validations and custom format checks
zrbrd_enforce() {
  zrbrd_sentinel

  buv_vet RBRD

  [[ "${RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER format: ${RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER} (expected lowercase alphanumeric starting with letter; no hyphens)"

  [[ "${RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*-$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX format: ${RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX} (expected lowercase starting with letter, ending in hyphen)"

  # Joint-length cap: GCP project IDs max 30 chars. RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID
  # composes as "${RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX}d-${RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER}".
  #
  # Test fixtures (rbtdrp_pristine, rbtdrk_canonical) compose BURS_TINCTURE
  # (1-3 chars) into BOTH the prefix and the moniker before writing rbrd.env
  # for parallel-station disjointness on a shared payor manor. The cap below
  # applies to whatever is in rbrd.env at validation time — production-
  # authored or fixture-written. Fixture bases are short (≤7 chars) so
  # tinctured fixture values stay well under the cap; the joint check exists
  # to catch operator-authored prefix+moniker pairs that would overflow.
  # The validator does not cross-reference BURS_TINCTURE (BURS may not be
  # kindled in every RBRD-enforce context); the literal field values are
  # the contract.
  local -r z_prefix_len=${#RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX}
  local -r z_moniker_len=${#RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER}
  local -r z_joint_len=$(( z_prefix_len + 2 + z_moniker_len ))
  test "${z_joint_len}" -le 30 \
    || buc_die "Joint length exceeds 30-char GCP project ID limit: RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX(${z_prefix_len}) + 'd-'(2) + RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER(${z_moniker_len}) = ${z_joint_len}"
}

# eof

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#

# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# RBRD CLI - Command line interface for RBRD depot regime operations

set -euo pipefail

source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"

######################################################################
# Command Functions

# Command: validate - enrollment-based validation report
rbrd_validate() {
  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRD depot regime configuration via enrollment report"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step "Validating RBRD depot regime file: ${RBBC_rbrd_file}"
  buv_report RBRD "Depot Regime"
  buc_step "RBRD depot regime valid"
}

# Command: render - diagnostic display of all RBRD fields
rbrd_render() {
  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRD depot regime configuration"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buv_render RBRD "RBRD - Recipe Bottle Regime Depot" "${RBBC_rbrd_file}"
}

######################################################################
# Furnish and Main

zrbrd_furnish() {
  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_TOOLS_DIR        " "Project tools root directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env_done || return 0

  source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh"
  local z_rbk_kit_dir="${BURD_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"

  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buv_validation.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/bupr_PresentationRegime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrd_regime.sh"
  source "${RBBC_rbrd_file}"

  zbuv_kindle
  zburd_kindle
  zburd_enforce
  zrbcc_kindle

  zrbrd_kindle
  zrbrd_enforce

  zbupr_kindle
}

buc_execute rbrd_ "Recipe Bottle Depot Regime" zrbrd_furnish "$@"

# eof

#!/bin/bash
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#

# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Depot Regime — depot-time-immutable identity and infrastructure settings.
# Values here are written by the operator before depot levy and frozen for the
# productive lifetime of the depot. Changing any value after levy requires a fresh depot.

# Depot identity — CLOUD_PREFIX pairs with DEPOT_MONIKER to derive
# project ID, GAR repository, pool stem, and bucket at kindle.
RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX=cancbhl-
RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER=canest2bhl100016

# GCP region — applied to GAR repository, worker pools, and Cloud Build submissions.
RBRD_GCP_REGION=us-central1

# Cloud Build private worker pool machine type (CE format, e.g., e2-standard-2,
# e2-highcpu-32, n2d-standard-4). Consumed at pool creation by depot levy.
RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE=e2-highcpu-32

# eof

#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.

# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Regime Repo - Validator Module

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBRR_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrr multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBRR_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbrr_*)

zrbrr_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrr already kindled"

  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.

  # Enroll all RBRR variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering

  buv_regime_enroll RBRR

  buv_group_enroll "Resource Prefixing"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX         2   11  "Prefix for cloud-visible resource names (depot project, GAR repo, GCS bucket, pool stem)"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX       2   11  "Prefix prepended to local container and network names"

  buv_group_enroll "Vessel and Local Configuration"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_VESSEL_DIR           1  255  "Vessel definitions directory"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_BOTTLE_WORKSPACE     1   64  "Container workspace path for bottle working directory"
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRR_DNS_SERVER                   "DNS server for containers"

  buv_group_enroll "GCP Infrastructure"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER            1   26  "Depot moniker — paired with CLOUD_PREFIX to derive depot project ID, GAR repo, pool stem, and bucket"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRR_GCP_REGION               1   32  "GCP region"

  buv_group_enroll "Google Cloud Build Configuration"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE           3   64  "Machine type for Cloud Build (CE format)"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT                2   10  "Build timeout (e.g., 1200s)"
  buv_decimal_enroll RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS  1  999  "Min concurrent builds required"

  buv_group_enroll "Secrets Directory"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_SECRETS_DIR              1  512  "Directory containing credential files"

  buv_group_enroll "Public Docs"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL          1  512  "Public docs URL — readme target for buh_tlt glossary links, updated per-release or per-incorporation"

  # Guard against unexpected RBRR_ variables not in enrollment
  buv_scope_sentinel RBRR RBRR_

  # Build docker env args array from validated values
  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV=("-e" "RBRR_DNS_SERVER=${RBRR_DNS_SERVER}")
  readonly ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV

  # Lock all enrolled RBRR_ variables against mutation
  buv_lock RBRR

  readonly ZRBRR_KINDLED=1
}

zrbrr_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrr not kindled - call zrbrr_kindle first"
}

# Enforce all RBRR enrollment validations and custom format checks
zrbrr_enforce() {
  zrbrr_sentinel

  buv_vet RBRR

  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}"
  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}"

  [[ "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" =~ ^[0-9]+s$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT format: ${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT} (expected NNNs)"

  [[ "${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER format: ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER} (expected lowercase alphanumeric starting with letter; no hyphens)"

  [[ "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}"   =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*-$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX format: ${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}   (expected lowercase starting with letter, ending in hyphen)"

  [[ "${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*-$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX format: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX} (expected lowercase starting with letter, ending in hyphen)"

  # Joint-length cap: GCP project IDs max 30 chars. RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID
  # composes as "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}d-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}".
  #
  # Test fixtures (rbtdrp_pristine, rbtdrk_canonical) compose BURS_TINCTURE
  # (1-3 chars) into BOTH the prefix and the moniker before writing rbrr.env
  # for parallel-station disjointness on a shared payor manor. The cap below
  # applies to whatever is in rbrr.env at validation time — production-
  # authored or fixture-written. Fixture bases are short (≤7 chars) so
  # tinctured fixture values stay well under the cap; the joint check exists
  # to catch operator-authored prefix+moniker pairs that would overflow.
  # The validator does not cross-reference BURS_TINCTURE (BURS may not be
  # kindled in every RBRR-enforce context); the literal field values are
  # the contract.
  local -r z_prefix_len=${#RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}
  local -r z_moniker_len=${#RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}
  local -r z_joint_len=$(( z_prefix_len + 2 + z_moniker_len ))
  test "${z_joint_len}" -le 30 \
    || buc_die "Joint length exceeds 30-char GCP project ID limit: RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX(${z_prefix_len}) + 'd-'(2) + RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER(${z_moniker_len}) = ${z_joint_len}"

}

# eof

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at

# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Regime Repo - Validator Module

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBRR_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrr multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBRR_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbrr_*)

zrbrr_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrr already kindled"

  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.

  # Enroll all RBRR variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering

  buv_regime_enroll RBRR

  buv_group_enroll "Runtime Prefix"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX       2   11  "Prefix prepended to local container and network names"

  buv_group_enroll "Vessel and Local Configuration"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_VESSEL_DIR           1  255  "Vessel definitions directory"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_BOTTLE_WORKSPACE     1   64  "Container workspace path for bottle working directory"
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRR_DNS_SERVER                   "DNS server for containers"

  buv_group_enroll "Google Cloud Build Configuration"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT                2   10  "Build timeout (e.g., 1200s)"
  buv_decimal_enroll RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS  1  999  "Min concurrent builds required"

  buv_group_enroll "Secrets Directory"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_SECRETS_DIR              1  512  "Directory containing credential files"

  buv_group_enroll "Public Docs"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL          1  512  "Public docs URL — readme target for buh_tlt glossary links, updated per-release or per-incorporation"

  # Guard against unexpected RBRR_ variables not in enrollment
  buv_scope_sentinel RBRR RBRR_

  # Build docker env args array from validated values
  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV=("-e" "RBRR_DNS_SERVER=${RBRR_DNS_SERVER}")
  readonly ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV

  # Lock all enrolled RBRR_ variables against mutation
  buv_lock RBRR

  readonly ZRBRR_KINDLED=1
}

zrbrr_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrr not kindled - call zrbrr_kindle first"
}

# Enforce all RBRR enrollment validations and custom format checks
zrbrr_enforce() {
  zrbrr_sentinel

  buv_vet RBRR

  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}"
  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}"

  [[ "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" =~ ^[0-9]+s$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT format: ${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT} (expected NNNs)"

  [[ "${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER format: ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER} (expected lowercase alphanumeric starting with letter; no hyphens)"

  [[ "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}"   =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*-$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX format: ${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}   (expected lowercase starting with letter, ending in hyphen)"

  [[ "${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*-$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX format: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX} (expected lowercase starting with letter, ending in hyphen)"

  # Joint-length cap: GCP project IDs max 30 chars. RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID
  # composes as "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}d-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}".
  #
  # Test fixtures (rbtdrp_pristine, rbtdrk_canonical) compose BURS_TINCTURE
  # (1-3 chars) into BOTH the prefix and the moniker before writing rbrr.env
  # for parallel-station disjointness on a shared payor manor. The cap below
  # applies to whatever is in rbrr.env at validation time — production-
  # authored or fixture-written. Fixture bases are short (≤7 chars) so
  # tinctured fixture values stay well under the cap; the joint check exists
  # to catch operator-authored prefix+moniker pairs that would overflow.
  # The validator does not cross-reference BURS_TINCTURE (BURS may not be
  # kindled in every RBRR-enforce context); the literal field values are
  # the contract.
  local -r z_prefix_len=${#RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}
  local -r z_moniker_len=${#RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}
  local -r z_joint_len=$(( z_prefix_len + 2 + z_moniker_len ))
  test "${z_joint_len}" -le 30 \
    || buc_die "Joint length exceeds 30-char GCP project ID limit: RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX(${z_prefix_len}) + 'd-'(2) + RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER(${z_moniker_len}) = ${z_joint_len}"

}

# eof

# Recipe Bottle Repository Configuration - Base Values

# Runtime prefix — local container and network names. 2–11 chars, lowercase,
# ending in hyphen (e.g., "prod-", "bhyslop-").
RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX=canrbhl-

RBRR_DNS_SERVER=8.8.8.8

# Reference directory containing specs for all vessels: relative to project root
RBRR_VESSEL_DIR=rbev-vessels

# Container workspace path — working directory for all bottle containers
RBRR_BOTTLE_WORKSPACE=/workspace

# Google Cloud Build settings
RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT=2700s
RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS=3

# Secrets directory — contains all credential files (RBRA and RBRO format)
# Credential file paths are derived as kindle constants in rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh
RBRR_SECRETS_DIR=../station-files/secrets

# Public documentation URL — target for buh_tlt glossary links.
# Update per-release (swap branch name) or per-incorporation (point at your fork).
RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL="https://github.com/bhyslop/recipemuster/blob/main/README.md"

# eof

content.text: Sed didn't take. Let me try with a more explicit loop:

input.command:
find /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster \( -name ".claude" -o -name "Memos" -o -name "logs-buk" \) -prune -o -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.adoc" -o -name "*.rs" -o -name "*.md" \) -print 2>/dev/null > /tmp/rbrd_targets.txt
echo "Total candidate files:"; wc -l /tmp/rbrd_targets.txt

content.content:
Total candidate files:
     887 /tmp/rbrd_targets.txt

toolUseResult.stdout:
Total candidate files:

input.command:
while IFS= read -r f; do
  case "$f" in
    *rbrd_regime.sh|*rbrd_cli.sh|*rbrr_regime.sh|*rblm_cli.sh) continue ;;
  esac
  if grep -q "RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX\|RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER\|RBRR_GCP_REGION\|RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE\|rbrr_cloud_prefix\|rbrr_depot_moniker\|rbrr_gcp_region\|rbrr_gcb_machine_type" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then
    sed -i '' -e 's/RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX/RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX/g' \
              -e 's/RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER/RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER/g' \
              -e 's/RBRR_GCP_REGION/RBRD_GCP_REGION/g' \
              -e 's/RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE/RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE/g' \
              -e 's/rbrr_cloud_prefix/rbrd_cloud_prefix/g' \
              -e 's/rbrr_depot_moniker/rbrd_depot_moniker/g' \
              -e 's/rbrr_gcp_region/rbrd_gcp_region/g' \
              -e 's/rbrr_gcb_machine_type/rbrd_gcb_machine_type/g' "$f"
    echo "edited: $f"
  fi
done < /tmp/rbrd_targets.txt 2>&1 | tail -50
echo "---"
echo "Remaining RBRR/rbrr four-var hits (should only be in rblm_cli.sh):"
grep -rln "RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX\|RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER\|RBRR_GCP_REGION\|RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE\|rbrr_cloud_prefix\|rbrr_depot_moniker\|rbrr_gcp_region\|rbrr_gcb_machine_type" /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster --include="*.sh" --include="*.adoc" --include="*.rs" --include="*.md" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "/\.claude/" | grep -v "/Memos/"

1	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
2	# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
3	#
4	# Recipe Bottle base compose file — static infrastructure
5	#
6	# Invoked via:
7	#   docker compose --env-file .rbk/rbrr.env --env-file .rbk/{moniker}/rbrn.env \
8	#     -f .rbk/rbob_compose.yml [-f .rbk/{moniker}/compose.yml] -p {moniker} up -d
9	#
10	# Env-file variables serve dual purpose:
11	#   1. YAML interpolation (${VAR} in this file — image refs, subnet, container names)
12	#   2. Container environment forwarding (bare names in environment: sections)
13	#
14	# Network topology:
15	#   sentry: transit (uplink to internet via bridge) + enclave (down to bottle)
16	#     Interface naming and default-route assignment are NOT controlled by compose:
17	#       - eth0/eth1 ordering is Docker-engine-defined (sentry IP-discovers via RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP)
18	#       - default route is assigned to the alphabetically-first attached network's gateway
19	#         (compose 'priority:' keys empirically do NOT influence this on linux Docker
20	#         engine 28.x or mac Docker Desktop 28.x — sentry replaces the default route
21	#         with one via uplink at RBJp1, see rbjs_sentry.sh)
22	#   pentacle: enclave only (static IP, routes through sentry)
23	#   bottle: shares pentacle network namespace (network_mode: service:pentacle)
24	#
25	# Health chain: sentry healthy → pentacle starts → pentacle healthy → bottle starts (sessile profile)
26	
27	services:
28	  sentry:
29	    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/rbi_hm/${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}/image:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}
30	    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-sentry
31	    privileged: true
32	    networks:
33	      transit: {}
34	      enclave:
35	        ipv4_address: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}
36	    ports:
37	      - "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}:${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}"
38	    environment:
39	      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP
40	      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK
41	      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
42	      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP
43	      - RBRR_DNS_SERVER
44	      - RBRN_ENTRY_MODE
45	      - RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION
46	      - RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE
47	      - RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE
48	      - RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
49	      - RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE
50	      - RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS
51	      - RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
52	      - RBJE_PROBE
53	    healthcheck:
54	      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "test -f /tmp/rbjh_healthy"]
55	      interval: 2s
56	      timeout: 5s
57	      retries: 15
58	      start_period: 5s
59	
60	  pentacle:
61	    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/rbi_hm/${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}/image:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}
62	    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-pentacle
63	    privileged: true
64	    networks:
65	      enclave:
66	        ipv4_address: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}
67	    environment:
68	      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
69	    command: ["/opt/rbk/rbjp_pentacle.sh"]
70	    depends_on:
71	      sentry:
72	        condition: service_healthy
73	    healthcheck:
74	      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "test -f /tmp/rbjph_healthy"]
75	      interval: 2s
76	      timeout: 5s
77	      retries: 15
78	      start_period: 5s
79	
80	  bottle:
81	    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/rbi_hm/${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}/image:${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}
82	    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-bottle
83	    network_mode: "service:pentacle"
84	    security_opt:
85	      - label:disable
86	    cap_drop:
87	      - NET_RAW
88	      - NET_ADMIN
89	    environment:
90	      - RBOB_HOST_UID
91	      - RBOB_HOST_GID
92	      - RBRV_USER
93	    depends_on:
94	      pentacle:
95	        condition: service_healthy
96	    profiles:
97	      - sessile
98	
99	networks:
100	  transit:
101	    driver: bridge
102	  enclave:
103	    driver: bridge
104	    ipam:
105	      config:
106	        - subnet: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}

file.content:
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
#
# Recipe Bottle base compose file — static infrastructure
#
# Invoked via:
#   docker compose --env-file .rbk/rbrr.env --env-file .rbk/{moniker}/rbrn.env \
#     -f .rbk/rbob_compose.yml [-f .rbk/{moniker}/compose.yml] -p {moniker} up -d
#
# Env-file variables serve dual purpose:
#   1. YAML interpolation (${VAR} in this file — image refs, subnet, container names)
#   2. Container environment forwarding (bare names in environment: sections)
#
# Network topology:
#   sentry: transit (uplink to internet via bridge) + enclave (down to bottle)
#     Interface naming and default-route assignment are NOT controlled by compose:
#       - eth0/eth1 ordering is Docker-engine-defined (sentry IP-discovers via RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP)
#       - default route is assigned to the alphabetically-first attached network's gateway
#         (compose 'priority:' keys empirically do NOT influence this on linux Docker
#         engine 28.x or mac Docker Desktop 28.x — sentry replaces the default route
#         with one via uplink at RBJp1, see rbjs_sentry.sh)
#   pentacle: enclave only (static IP, routes through sentry)
#   bottle: shares pentacle network namespace (network_mode: service:pentacle)
#
# Health chain: sentry healthy → pentacle starts → pentacle healthy → bottle starts (sessile profile)

services:
  sentry:
    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/rbi_hm/${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}/image:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}
    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-sentry
    privileged: true
    networks:
      transit: {}
      enclave:
        ipv4_address: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}
    ports:
      - "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}:${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}"
    environment:
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP
      - RBRR_DNS_SERVER
      - RBRN_ENTRY_MODE
      - RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION
      - RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS
      - RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
      - RBJE_PROBE
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "test -f /tmp/rbjh_healthy"]
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15
      start_period: 5s

  pentacle:
    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/rbi_hm/${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}/image:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}
    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-pentacle
    privileged: true
    networks:
      enclave:
        ipv4_address: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}
    environment:
      - RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
    command: ["/opt/rbk/rbjp_pentacle.sh"]
    depends_on:
      sentry:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "test -f /tmp/rbjph_healthy"]
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 15
      start_period: 5s

  bottle:
    image: ${RBRR_GCP_REGION}-docker.pkg.dev/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/rbi_hm/${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}/image:${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}
    container_name: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}-bottle
    network_mode: "service:pentacle"
    security_opt:
      - label:disable
    cap_drop:
      - NET_RAW
      - NET_ADMIN
    environment:
      - RBOB_HOST_UID
      - RBOB_HOST_GID
      - RBRV_USER
    depends_on:
      pentacle:
        condition: service_healthy
    profiles:
      - sessile

networks:
  transit:
    driver: bridge
  enclave:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}

195	zrbob_sentinel() {

199	######################################################################
200	# Compose Command Helper
201	
202	# Build and execute a compose command with standard args
203	# Usage: zrbob_compose <compose_subcommand> [args...]
204	zrbob_compose() {
205	  zrbob_sentinel
206	
207	  local z_args=()
208	  z_args+=("compose")
209	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBRR}")
210	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBDC}")
211	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBJE}")
212	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBRN}")
213	  z_args+=("-f" "${ZRBOB_COMPOSE_BASE}")
214	
215	  # Include nameplate fragment if it exists
216	  if test -f "${ZRBOB_COMPOSE_FRAGMENT}"; then
217	    z_args+=("-f" "${ZRBOB_COMPOSE_FRAGMENT}")
218	  fi
219	
220	  z_args+=("-p" "${ZRBOB_PROJECT}")
221	  z_args+=("$@")
222	
223	  buc_log_args "${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} ${z_args[*]}"
224	  "${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}" "${z_args[@]}"
225	}
226	
227	######################################################################
228	# Auto-Summon Helpers
229	
230	# Discriminate kludge hallmarks (local-only, no GAR presence) from conjure /
231	# bind / graft hallmarks. Used by charge preflight to redirect the diagnostic
232	# away from the summon path, which is guaranteed to fail for kludge stamps.
233	zrbob_hallmark_is_kludge() {
234	  case "${1}" in
235	    "${RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_KLUDGE}"*) return 0 ;;
236	    *) return 1 ;;
237	  esac
238	}
239	
240	# Pull all three arks (image, about, vouch) for a hallmark to local runtime.
241	# Used when charge detects a missing local artifact and needs to bootstrap.
242	# Mirrors rbfr_summon's all-three-arks semantics; called inline rather than
243	# as a tabtarget invocation because rbob is the sole caller and avoids the
244	# launcher-dispatch round-trip.
245	zrbob_summon_full_hallmark() {
246	  local z_hallmark="${1:-}"
247	
248	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "zrbob_summon_full_hallmark: hallmark required"
249	
250	  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
251	  local z_image_ref="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${z_hallmark}"
252	  local z_about_ref="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}:${z_hallmark}"
253	  local z_vouch_ref="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${z_hallmark}"
254	
255	  local z_registry_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
256	  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
257	
258	  local z_token
259	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token for auto-summon"
260	
261	  buc_step "Auto-summoning hallmark ${z_hallmark} (image + about + vouch)"
262	
263	  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${z_registry_host}" \
264	    || buc_die "Container registry authentication failed during auto-summon"
265	
266	  docker pull "${z_image_ref}" || buc_die "Failed to pull image ark: ${z_image_ref}"
267	  docker pull "${z_about_ref}" || buc_die "Failed to pull about ark: ${z_about_ref}"
268	  docker pull "${z_vouch_ref}" || buc_die "Failed to pull vouch ark: ${z_vouch_ref}"
269	
270	  buc_info "Auto-summoned: ${z_hallmark}"
271	}
272	
273	# Pull a single image ref to local runtime — used by the image-only auto-summon
274	# branch in rbob_charge as defense-in-depth for partial-state cases (vouch
275	# present but image missing). The full-hallmark helper above covers the common
276	# path where all arks are missing together.
277	# Usage: zrbob_vouch_gate_and_summon <vessel> <hallmark> <image_ref>
278	zrbob_vouch_gate_and_summon() {
279	  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
280	  local z_hallmark="${2:-}"
281	  local z_image_ref="${3:-}"
282	
283	  test -n "${z_vessel}"       || buc_die "zrbob_vouch_gate_and_summon: vessel required"
284	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "zrbob_vouch_gate_and_summon: hallmark required"
285	  test -n "${z_image_ref}"    || buc_die "zrbob_vouch_gate_and_summon: image_ref required"
286	
287	  local z_registry_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
288	  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
289	
290	  local z_token
291	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token for auto-summon"
292	
293	  # Pull the image
294	  buc_step "Auto-summoning ${z_image_ref}"
295	
296	  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${z_registry_host}" \
297	    || buc_die "Container registry authentication failed during auto-summon"
298	
299	  docker pull "${z_image_ref}" || buc_die "Failed to pull image: ${z_image_ref}"
300	
301	  buc_info "Auto-summoned: ${z_image_ref}"
302	}
303	
304	######################################################################
305	# Charge Invariant — Network Collision Detection
306	
307	# Die if any compose-managed network with our nameplate exists from a foreign
308	# project. Catches pre-prefix-era residue (project=tadmor without RBRR
309	# prefix) and any other compose project whose name is the bare moniker or
310	# ends with "-{moniker}". Match is by labels — independent of how compose
311	# joined project + network into the network name.
312	zrbob_detect_nameplate_collision() {
313	  zrbob_sentinel
314	
315	  local -r z_networks_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbob_collision_networks.txt"
316	  local -r z_networks_stderr="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbob_collision_networks_stderr.txt"
317	  local -r z_inspect_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbob_collision_inspect_"
318	
319	  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} network ls \
320	    --filter 'label=com.docker.compose.project' \
321	    --filter 'label=com.docker.compose.network' \
322	    --format '{{.Name}}' \
323	    > "${z_networks_file}" 2>"${z_networks_stderr}" \
324	    || buc_die "Failed to list Docker networks for collision detection — see ${z_networks_stderr}"
325	
326	  local z_names=()
327	  local z_line=""
328	  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
329	    test -n "${z_line}" || continue
330	    z_names+=("${z_line}")
331	  done < "${z_networks_file}"
332	
333	  local z_offenders=()
334	  local z_index=0
